section.content: 本发明提供了包含种或多种化合物的组合物，所述化合物的结构包含：具有4至12个碳原子的节点结构、个或多个(聚)甘油基基团、以及个或多个疏水部分，其中所述个或多个(聚)甘油基基团的每个都通过第初级连接基连接到所述节点结构上，所述个或多个疏水部分各自独立地通过初级连接基连接到所述节点结构上或通过次级连接基连接到所述(聚)甘油基基团之上，并且其中所述聚甘油基增稠剂的平均甘油基聚合度大于3至小于约11，以及每个初级连接基的平均疏水基团数为约0.35或更大。本发明还提供了聚甘油基化合物，包含水、表面活性剂和聚甘油基增稠剂的组合物，以及制备本发明的聚甘油基化合物和组合物的方法。

The invention provides the compositions comprising one or more compounds, the structure of described compound comprises: have the node structure of 4 to 12 carbon atoms, one or more (gathering) glyceryl group, and one or more hydrophobic part, each of wherein said one or more (gathering) glyceryl group is connected on described node structure by the first primary linker, the one or more hydrophobic part is connected on described node structure by primary linker independently of one another or is connected on one of described (gathering) glyceryl group by secondary linker, and the average glyceryl degree of polymerization of wherein said polyglyceryl thickening agent is more than 3 to less than about 11, and the average hydrophobicity group number of each primary linker is about 0.35 or bigger.Present invention also offers Polyglyceryl compounds, comprise water, surfactant and the compositions of polyglyceryl thickening agent, and prepare Polyglyceryl compounds and the method for compositions of the present invention.

Polyglyceryl compounds and compositionsThe cross reference of related application

The temporary patent application No.61/413,712's that patent application claims was submitted on November 15th, 2010 is preferential Power, this full patent texts is incorporated by reference herein.

Technical field

The present invention relates to can be used for the polyglyceryl thickening agent of multiple application (including human body clean) and comprise polyglycereol The compositions of base thickening agent.

Background technology

Synthectic detergents, such as cationic surfactant, anion surfactant, amphoteric surfactant and non-from Sub-surface activating agent, is widely used in multiple detergent and Cleasing compositions, to give its clean-up performance.Additionally, at some In compositions (such as personal care composition, such as shampoo, abluent etc.), may be desirable for surfactant and such as The one-tenth split-phase mixing of thickening agent, relatively to realize such as gentleness degree, foam volume, foam stability and rheological behaviour etc property The required balance of energy.

Conventional thickening agent kind (often comprises more than 100 for having bigger polar head group and height ethoxylation Mole oxirane (EO)) amphiphile, amphiphilic molecule.Regrettably, ethoxylation needs the EO of large volume, and this is that one passes through second The air oxidation of alkene gas and the gaseous petroleum chemical industry derivant that synthesizes.EO has obvious health and safety risk, is a kind of Intractable chemicals, in addition, owing to crude oil and gas reserves are limited, in the long run, many people are regarded as Unsustainable product.Additionally, the by-product of ethoxylation is cyclic ethers Isosorbide-5-Nitrae-twoAlkane, it is under high exposure level can Doubt carcinogen.Ethoxylation material usually contains the Isosorbide-5-Nitrae-two of trace (10-100ppm)Alkane, it is necessary to use special separation side Method (such as vacuum extraction) could be by Isosorbide-5-Nitrae-twoThe content of alkane drops to undetectable level.Isosorbide-5-Nitrae-twoAlkane is with trace level When being present in Cleasing compositions, it is not intended as that necessarily there is health or security risk.But, with Isosorbide-5-Nitrae-twoIt is negative that alkane is correlated with Public image has promoted people to look for the product without ethoxylation material.

Inventor has recognized that, it is desirable to the ethoxylation thickening agent of more natural and reproducible material substitution synthesis.So And, it is special that the natural thickener of such as plant gum is generally of the most worthless viscosity, pseudoplastic behavior and/or elastic rheology Property.Therefore, it was recognized by the inventor that be highly desirable to prepare the compositions with more natural and/or reproducible thickening agent, to subtract Few disadvantages mentioned above.Inventor it is also recognized that, it is not necessary to the thickening agent of ethoxylation is highly desirable, especially can be with aesthetics On the thickening agent of a series of personal care product formulations of mode thickening that can be esthetically acceptable to the consumers.

Summary of the invention

The invention provides polyglyceryl thickening agent, which overcome the shortcoming of prior art and interpolation can be improved this gathers The viscosity of the compositions of glyceryl thickening agent.

According to an aspect, the invention provides the polyglyceryl compositions comprising one or more compounds, describedization The structure of compound comprises: have the node structure of 4 to 12 carbon atoms, one or more (gathering) glyceryl group and one or Multiple hydrophobic parts, each of wherein said one or more (gathering) glyceryl group is connected by the first primary linker On described node structure, the one or more hydrophobic part is connected to described node by primary linker independently of one another It is connected on one of described (gathering) glyceryl group in structure or by secondary linker, and wherein polyglyceryl thickening agent The average glyceryl degree of polymerization be more than 3 to about 11, and the average hydrophobicity group number of each primary linker is about 0.35 or more Greatly.

section.content: The new amino-acid modified silane compound with faintly acid amino and alkalescence carboxyl can be used as surface conditioning agent or fabric-treating agent.
具有弱酸性氨基和弱碱性羧基的新的氨基酸改性的硅烷化合物可用作表面处理剂或织物处理剂。

Amino-acid modified silane compound and preparation methodTechnical field

The present invention relates to new amino-acid modified silane compound and preparation method thereof.These silane compounds Can be used as oil paint additive, binding agent, silane coupler, fabric-treating agent, surface conditioning agent etc..

Background technology

Can be used as being applied over base material and give the surface of its surface hydrophilicity containing amino silane compounds is known and process Agent, and it is used as to be applied over fiber and fabric gives the fabric-treating agent of its hydrophilicity.Exemplary compounds Including TSL 8330, amino propyl methyl dimethoxysilane, aminoethylaminopropyl Trimethoxy silane and aminoethylaminopropyl methyl dimethoxysilane.Although these contain Aminosilylation Compound can give hydrophilicity, but they surface soilings that imparting was processed and anti-fungal property side Face validity is the best.

Those can not only give hydrophilic, and can give the surface soiling and anti-fungal property processed Compound be also known.Such as, patent document 1 discloses that the silane compound with tetraalkyl ammonium, Such as 3-(trimethoxysilyl) propyl group octadecyldimethyl ammonium chloride.Patent documentation 1 and 2 disclosure Comprise the silane compound of thetine group, and comprise the silane compound of quaternary ammonium and carboxyl.

But, these compounds are the most unsatisfactory.Although described in patent documentation 1 containing tetra-allkylammonium Silane compound can give anti-fungal property, but they can not give gratifying antifouling property, Because the base material processed or fabric face be static electrification positive charge due to tetraalkylammonium group so that dust and Chip deposits from the teeth outwards due to Electrostatic Absorption.Because the sulfur-bearing described in patent documentation 2 and 3 is for Radix Betae The silane compound containing tetra-allkylammonium and carboxyl described in the silane compound of alkali and patent documentation 3 is at molecule Middle formation amphion, so compared with processing with the silane compound containing tetra-allkylammonium, the base material processed Or the less electrostatic charge of fabric face band.Silane chemical combination owing to sulfonic group is strong acid, containing thetine Thing has the bias towards negative charge side, and due to tetraalkylammonium group, containing tetra-allkylammonium and the silicon of carboxyl Hydride compounds has the bias towards positive charge side.Due to relative to electroneutral this bias, it is impossible to obtain Gratifying antifouling property.

Quotation list

Patent documentation 1:JP-A S63-500991 (WO 87/06470)

Patent documentation 2:JP-A H05-222064

Patent documentation 3:WO 1995/10523 (USP 5936703)

Summary of the invention

It is an object of the present invention to provide and can give the most antifouling and hydrophilicity amino-acid modified silicon Hydride compounds and preparation method thereof.

Inventor has been found that hydrophilic and the soil resistance of certain amino-acid modified silane compound display improvement Can, because it does not has electric charge to bias.When this compound is used as surface conditioning agent or fabric-treating agent, process The surface crossed keeps electric neutrality, because electric charge is offset by faintly acid amino and alkalescence carboxyl.Therefore, by electricity The surface adsorption that lotus causes is minimized.Which ensure that hydrophilic and the antifouling property of improvement.

On the one hand, the present invention provides one to have an amino-acid modified silane compound of formula (1):

Wherein R1、R4And R5It is respectively hydrogen or substituted or unsubstituted C1-C20Monovalent hydrocarbon, R2And R3It is respectively Substituted or unsubstituted C1-C20Monovalent hydrocarbon, R6For hydrogen, substituted or unsubstituted C1-C20Monovalent hydrocarbon or carboxylic Base, a is 0 or 1, and b is the integer of 1 to 10, and n is 0,1 or 2.

Preferably in formula (1), R1、R4And R5It is respectively hydrogen, R6For hydrogen or carboxyl, a is 1, and b is 3, and And n is 0,1 or 2.

The silane compound of typical formula (1) is N-(3-trimethoxy-silylpropyl)-Beta-alanine, N-(3-methyl dimethoxy epoxide silylpropyl)-Beta-alanine, N-(3-triethoxysilylpropyltetrasulfide)- Beta-alanine, N-(3-methyl diethoxy silylpropyl)-Beta-alanine, N-(3-trimethoxy first Ethoxysilylpropyl) aspartic acid, N-(3-methyl dimethoxy epoxide silylpropyl) aspartic acid, N-(3-tri- Triethoxysilyl propyl group) aspartic acid, and N-(3-methyl diethoxy silylpropyl) Radix Asparagi ammonia Acid.

On the other hand, the present invention provides the method for the amino-acid modified silane compound of a kind of formula (1), De-three organic group first including the amino-acid modified silane compound that the silicyl with formula (2) is protected Silicon alkyl reaction:

Wherein R1' for R1Or three organosilyl groups R10R11R12Si-, R1、R4And R5Be respectively hydrogen or replacement or Unsubstituted C1-C20Monovalent hydrocarbon, R2And R3It is respectively substituted or unsubstituted C1-C20Monovalent hydrocarbon, R6' it is Hydrogen, substituted or unsubstituted C1-C20Monovalent hydrocarbon or the carboxyl of silicyl protection, R7、R8、R9、R10、R11 And R12It is respectively substituted or unsubstituted C1-C20Monovalent hydrocarbon, a is 0 or 1, and b is the integer of 1 to 10, And n is 0,1 or 2.

The beneficial effect of the invention

When this amino-acid modified silane compound is used as surface conditioning agent or fabric-treating agent, processed Surface keeps electric neutrality, because electric charge is offset by faintly acid amino and alkalescence carboxyl.Therefore, electric charge draw The surface adsorption risen is minimized.Which ensure that hydrophilic and the antifouling property of improvement.Therefore this compound may be used As oil paint additive, binding agent, silane coupler, fabric-treating agent and surface conditioning agent etc..

Three organosilyl groupsization reactions are gone can such as to use the compound with active hydrogen to carry out.Have The suitable compound of active hydrogen includes alcohol, such as methanol, ethanol and isopropanol；Phenol, such as phenol, cresol And xylenols；Carboxylic acid, such as formic acid, acetic acid and propanoic acid；And mineral acid, such as hydrochloric acid, sulphuric acid and nitre Acid.

The compound of formula (2) and the compound with active hydrogen can combine with any required ratio.Consider To reactive and productivity, the compound with active hydrogen preferably uses with such amount so that based on every mole Three organosilyl groups on the compound of formula (2), give 0.5 to 100 mole, more preferably 1 to 20 Mole active hydrogen.

Although reaction condition is not particularly limited, but reaction temperature is preferably 0 to 200 DEG C, more preferably 10 to 150 DEG C, and the response time be preferably 1 to 40 hour, more preferably 1 to 20 hour.

Solvent may be used for reaction, but reaction can be carried out in the absence of a solvent.Suitably solvent Including hydrocarbon solvent, such as pentane, hexane, hexamethylene, heptane, isobutyltrimethylmethane., benzene, toluene and dimethylbenzene； Ether flux, such as diethyl ether, oxolane and two Alkane；Ester solvent, such as ethyl acetate and butyl acetate； Aprotic polar solvent, such as acetonitrile, DMF and N-Methyl pyrrolidone；And chlorinated hydrocabon Solvent, such as dichloromethane and chloroform.Solvent can be individually or with two or more mixture shape Formula uses.

Standard technique, such as filtration, solvent washing and recrystallization etc. can be used, return from gained reaction solution Receive target compound.During use, this compound can be dissolved in suitable solvent.

Embodiment

Embodiments of the invention given below are as illustrative not limiting.

Synthetic example 1

The synthesis of N-(2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-TSL 8330

Will be equipped with the flask of agitator, reflux condenser, Dropping funnel and thermometer loads 179.3g (1.0 Mol) 3-TSL 8330 and the acetonitrile of 17.9g 70 DEG C of heating.Once internal temperature Degree becomes stable, drips 228.4g (1.0mol) acrylic acid triisopropylsilyl ester in two hours, Stirring 3 hours the most at such a temperature.Then under 0.4kPa pressure, low boiling fraction is removed, it is thus achieved that 425.3

N-(the 2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-aminopropyl trimethoxy silicon of g colorless clear liquid form Alkane.

Embodiment 1

Synthesized by N-(2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-TSL 8330 N-(3-trimethoxy-silylpropyl)-Beta-alanine

Make the flask equipped with agitator, reflux condenser, Dropping funnel and thermometer loads 122.3g (0.3 Mol) N-in synthetic example 1 (2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-aminopropyl-front three TMOS 50 DEG C of heating.Once internal temperature becomes stable, drips 10.6g (0.33 in 1 hour Mol) methanol.Stirring reaction solution 6 hours at such a temperature.Gained solid is collected by filtration, uses 200ml Hexane washs, and is dried under vacuum.Obtain 50.4g white solid.

By1This solid of H-NMR and IR analysis of spectrum.Fig. 1 and 2 shows respectively1H-NMR composes (dense methanol solvate) Compose with IR.According to these data, confirm this compound be N-(3-trimethoxy-silylpropyl)-β- Alanine.

Synthetic example 2

The conjunction of N-(2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-amino propyl methyl dimethoxysilane Become

Make to load 163.3g (1.0 equipped with in agitator, reflux condenser, dropping liquid leakage half and the flask of thermometer Mol) 3-amino propyl methyl dimethoxysilane heating at 70 DEG C.Once internal temperature becomes stable, 228.4g (1.0mol) acrylic acid triisopropylsilyl ester is dripped, subsequently in this temperature in 1 hour Lower stirring 6 hours.Obtain the N-(2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) of 391.2g light yellow clear liquid form Ethyl-3-amino propyl methyl dimethoxysilane.

Embodiment 2

Closed by N-(2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-aminopropyl-methyl dimethoxysilane Become N-(3-methyl dimethoxy epoxide silylpropyl)-Beta-alanine

Will be equipped with the flask of agitator, reflux condenser, Dropping funnel and thermometer loads 117.5g (0.3 Mol) N-in synthetic example 2 (2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-aminopropyl-methyl Dimethoxysilane also heats at 50 DEG C.Once internal temperature becomes stable, drips 10.6 in 1 hour G (0.33mol) methanol.Reaction solution is stirred 6 hours in this temperature.Gained solid is collected by filtration, Wash with 200ml hexane, and be dried under vacuum.Obtain 68.8g white solid.

By1This solid of H-NMR and IR analysis of spectrum.Fig. 3 and 4 shows respectively1H-NMR composes (dense methanol solvate) Compose with IR.According to these data, confirm this compound be N-(3-methyl dimethoxy epoxide silylpropyl)- Beta-alanine.

Synthetic example 3

The synthesis of N-(2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-APTES

Will be equipped with the flask of agitator, reflux condenser, Dropping funnel and thermometer loads 221.4g (1.0 Mol) APTES 70 DEG C of heating.Once internal temperature becomes stable, 1 Drip 228.4g (1.0mol) acrylic acid triisopropylsilyl ester in hour, stir the most at such a temperature Mix 6 hours.Obtain N-(the 2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) second of 449.1g light yellow clear liquid form Base-APTES.

Embodiment 3

By N-(2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-aminopropyl-triethoxysilane synthesis N-(3-triethoxysilylpropyltetrasulfide)-Beta-alanine

Will be equipped with the flask of agitator, reflux condenser, Dropping funnel and thermometer loads 90.0g (0.2 Mol) N-in synthetic example 3 (2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-aminopropyl-three second TMOS 50 DEG C of heating.Once internal temperature becomes stable, drips 92.2g (2.0mol) in 1 hour Ethanol.Stirring reaction solution 12 hours at such a temperature.At the end of reaction, remove excess ethyl alcohol under vacuo. The solid of precipitation is collected by filtration, washs with 150ml hexane, and be dried under vacuum.Obtain 31.6 G white solid.

By1This solid of H-NMR and IR analysis of spectrum.Fig. 5 and 6 shows respectively1H-NMR composes (dense methanol solvate) Compose with IR.According to these data, confirmation compound is N-(3-triethoxysilylpropyltetrasulfide)-β the-the third ammonia Acid.

Synthetic example 4

The conjunction of N-(2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-amino propyl methyl diethoxy silane Become

Make the flask equipped with agitator, reflux condenser, Dropping funnel and thermometer loads 191.3g (1.0 Mol) 3-amino propyl methyl diethoxy silane 70 DEG C of heating.Once internal temperature becomes stable, 228.4g (1.0mol) acrylic acid triisopropylsilyl ester is dripped, subsequently in this temperature in 1 hour Lower stirring 6 hours.Obtain the N-(2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) of 419.0g light yellow clear liquid form Ethyl-3-amino propyl methyl diethoxy silane.

Embodiment 4

Closed by N-(2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-aminopropyl-methyldiethoxysilane Become N-(3-methyl diethoxy silylpropyl)-Beta-alanine

Make the flask equipped with agitator, reflux condenser, Dropping funnel and thermometer loads 84.0g (0.2 Mol) N-in synthetic example 4 (2-triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl) ethyl-3-aminopropyl-methyl Diethoxy silane 50 DEG C of heating.Once internal temperature becomes stable, drips 92.2g in 1 hour (2.0mol) ethanol.Stirring reaction solution 12 hours at such a temperature.At the end of reaction, go under vacuo Except ethanol is measured by Laos.The solid of precipitation is collected by filtration, washs with 150ml hexane, and do in a vacuum Dry.Obtain 35.1g white solid.

By1This solid of H-NMR and IR analysis of spectrum.Fig. 7 and 8 shows respectively1H-NMR composes (dense methanol solvate) Compose with IR.According to these data, confirm this compound be N-(3-methyl diethoxy silylpropyl)- Beta-alanine.

Synthetic example 5

N-(1,2-double (triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl)) ethyl-3-TSL 8330 Synthesis

Make the flask equipped with agitator, reflux condenser, Dropping funnel and thermometer loads 17.9g (0.1 Mol) 3-aminopropyl trimethoxy carbonyl alkane 70 DEG C of heating.Once internal temperature becomes stable, and 1 is little Time double (triisopropylsilyl) ester of interior dropping 42.9g (0.1mol) maleic acid, subsequently in this temperature Lower stirring 6 hours.Obtain N-(1,2-double (triisopropyl monosilanes of the light yellow clear liquid form of 60.4g Epoxide carbonyl)) ethyl-3-TSL 8330.

Embodiment 5

From N-(1,2-double (triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl)) ethyl-3-aminopropyl-trimethoxy silicon Alkane synthesis N-(3-trimethoxy-silylpropyl) aspartic acid

Will be equipped with the flask of agitator, reflux condenser, Dropping funnel and thermometer loads 30.4g (0.05 Mol) N-in synthetic example 5 (1,2-double (triisopropyl siloxy carbonyl)) ethyl-3-aminopropan Base trimethoxy silane 50 DEG C of heating.Once internal temperature becomes stable, drips 3.5g in 1 hour (0.11mol) methanol.Stirring reaction solution 6 hours at such a temperature.Gained solid is collected by filtration, Wash with 60ml hexane, and be dried under vacuum.Obtain 13.4g white solid.

By1This solid of H-NMR and IR analysis of spectrum.Fig. 9 and 10 shows respectively1H-NMR composes (dense methanol solvate) Compose with IR.According to these data, confirm that this compound is N-(3-trimethoxy-silylpropyl) Radix Asparagi ammonia Acid.

Synthetic example 6

N-(2-trimethylsiloxy carbonyl) ethyl-N-trimethyl silyl-3-aminopropyl trimethoxy The synthesis of base silane

Will be equipped with the flask of agitator, reflux condenser, Dropping funnel and thermometer loads 136.8g (0.5 Mol) N-(2-trimethylsiloxy carbonyl) ethyl-N-trimethylsilyl-allyl amine and 0.65 G platinum/1,3-divinyl-1, the toluene solution of 1,3,3-tetramethyl disiloxane complex (platinum content 3wt%) And 70 DEG C of heating.Once internal temperature becomes stable, drips 61.1g (0.5mol) three in 1 hour Methoxy silane, the most at such a temperature stirring 5 hours.When distillation reaction solution, it is thus achieved that 128.5g Boiling point is at N-(the 2-trimethylsiloxy carbonyl) ethyl-N-of the fraction form of 139-140 DEG C/0.4kPa Trimethyl silyl-3-TSL 8330.Productivity 65%.

Embodiment 6

From N-(2-trimethylsiloxy carbonyl) ethyl-N-trimethyl silyl-3-aminopropyl front three TMOS synthesis N-(3-trimethoxy-silylpropyl)-Beta-alanine

Make the flask equipped with agitator, reflux condenser, Dropping funnel and thermometer loads 72.1g (0.2 Mol) N-in synthetic example 6 (2-trimethylsiloxy carbonyl) ethyl-N-trimethyl silyl -3-TSL 8330 50 DEG C of heating.Once internal temperature becomes stable, in 1 hour Dropping 14.1g (0.44mol) methanol.Stirring reaction solution 1 hour at such a temperature.It is collected by filtration Gained solid, washs with 150ml hexane, and is dried under vacuum.Obtain 45.0g white solid.

By1This solid of H-NMR and IR analysis of spectrum, finds that spectrum is consistent with those of embodiment 1.Therefore this change is confirmed Compound is N-(3-trimethoxy-silylpropyl)-Beta-alanine.

section.content: The present invention relates to process substrate processing method using same and the substrate board treatment of substrate.To the surface of the substrate supply solvent steam containing the solvent material that can dissolve fluohydric acid gas.Thus, the surface of substrate is covered by the liquid film containing solvent material.Then, the etchant vapor of fluohydric acid gas is contained to the supply of the surface of the substrate covered by the liquid film containing solvent material.Thus, the surface of substrate is etched.
本发明涉及处理基板的基板处理方法以及基板处理装置。向基板的表面供给含有能够溶解氟化氢的溶媒物质的溶媒蒸气。由此，通过含有溶媒物质的液膜覆盖基板的表面。然后，向被含有溶媒物质的液膜覆盖的基板的表面供给含有氟化氢的蚀刻蒸气。由此，对基板的表面进行蚀刻。

Substrate processing method using same and substrate board treatmentTechnical field

The present invention relates to process substrate processing method using same and the substrate board treatment of substrate.As processing object Substrate such as include semiconductor wafer, base plate for liquid crystal display device, plasma display substrate, FED (Field Emission Display: field-emitter display) substrate, light base-board for plate, disk With substrate, optomagnetic base-board for plate, base board for optical mask, ceramic substrate, substrate used for solar batteries etc..

Background technology

In the manufacturing process of semiconductor device and liquid crystal indicator, by semiconductor wafer, liquid crystal Substrates supply Fluohydric acid. (aqueous solution of fluohydric acid gas) such as display device glass substrate, carry out removing from substrate Remove the etching work procedure of unwanted film or remove the matting of granule from substrate.Such as, at Japan Patent The open 2010-118498 publication of application discloses following substrate processing method using same, i.e. by from spray After the pure water of mouth ejection defines the liquid film on the surface covering substrate, to the base covered by the liquid film of pure water The steam of the surface supply Fluohydric acid. of plate.

But, in the open 2010-118498 publication of Japanese patent application, due to pure from nozzle ejection Water, therefore to reduce the consumption of pure water, it is difficult to form the liquid film of very thin thickness on substrate.

Summary of the invention

It is an object of the invention to provide and can reduce operating cost and can equably substrate be lost The substrate processing method using same carved and substrate board treatment.

An embodiment of the invention provides a kind of substrate processing method using same, including: liquid film forming operation, Supply steam or the pure water vapor of specific organic compound to the surface of substrate, make the surface of aforesaid substrate Accompanying water and/or Organic substance are dissolved in above-mentioned organic compound or pure water, are organised by above-mentioned The liquid film of the liquid film of compound or pure water covers the surface of substrate, thus from the surface attachment at substrate have water and/ Or organic state becomes the state that the surface of substrate is covered by liquid film in uniform thickness, wherein, above-mentioned Specific organic compound is the low-boiling organic compound that can dissolve fluohydric acid gas and water and boiling point than water Thing；Etching work procedure, to the surface of the substrate covered by the liquid film supply etchant vapor containing fluohydric acid gas；With And operation repeatedly, a circulation including above-mentioned liquid film forming operation and above-mentioned etching work procedure is carried out repeatedly.

Solvent steam can be that the steam of solvent material (makes the gas that the solvent material of solid or liquid evaporates Body), it is also possible to be in addition to outside the steam of solvent material or mist (vaporific solvent material) possibly together with The steam of carrier gas (such as, non-active gas).Similarly, etchant vapor can be the steam of fluohydric acid gas, The steam possibly together with carrier gas outside the steam of fluohydric acid gas or mist can also be in addition to.

According to the method, to the surface of the substrate supply solvent steam containing solvent material.Solvent steam exists The surface aggregation of substrate, forms liquid film in uniform thickness.Thus, the surface of substrate is by containing solvent material Liquid film cover.Then, in this condition, the etching containing fluohydric acid gas to the supply of the surface of substrate is steamed Gas.Solvent material is the material that can dissolve fluohydric acid gas.Therefore, the fluohydric acid gas contained by etchant vapor is molten Solution liquid film on substrate, and spread in liquid film.Thus, equably the surface of substrate is lost Carve.So, to steam or the mist of substrate supply solvent material, therefore solvent material is supplied with to substrate The situation of liquid is compared, it is possible to cover the surface of substrate with a small amount of solvent material.And, it is possible at base The liquid film of very thin thickness is formed on plate, therefore, it is possible to the amount of liquid reduced on substrate.Accordingly, it is capable to it is enough few The etchant vapor of amount makes the concentration of the fluohydric acid gas in liquid film rise to etch required concentration.Therefore, it is possible to Reduce solvent steam and the consumption of etchant vapor.Thereby, it is possible to reduction operating cost, and can Equably substrate is etched.

Above-mentioned solvent material can also be the material that can dissolve fluohydric acid gas and water.

Specifically, above-mentioned solvent material can be water (such as, pure water (deionized water: Deionzied Water)), it is also possible to be organic compound described later.

In this case, solvent material can not only dissolve fluohydric acid gas, additionally it is possible to dissolves water, even if therefore On the local on the surface that adsorption moisture is attached to substrate, this adsorption moisture is also dissolved in the solvent thing on substrate Matter also spreads in liquid film.Therefore, the Status Change that the apparent condition of substrate is attached with moisture from local is The state covered by the liquid film of uniform thickness.Thus, the apparent condition that substrate holding is good is made.So After, when the apparent condition that substrate holding is good, supply etchant vapor to the surface of substrate.

Fluohydric acid gas reacts with substrate (including the thin film being formed at substrate) in the environment of there is water, Thus substrate is etched.According to the research of present inventor, when in attachment of moisture in the table of substrate Under the state of the local in face, when the supply etchant vapor of the surface of substrate, the part being attached with moisture is easy It is etched, the uniformity of etching may be made to reduce.Therefore, the shape of good apparent condition is kept at substrate Under state, supply etchant vapor to the surface of substrate, it is possible to suppression or prevent the local, surface of substrate It is etched and the roughness of substrate (roughness) deterioration.Thereby, it is possible to improve the uniformity of etching.

Above-mentioned solvent material can be to dissolve low-boiling organic than water of fluohydric acid gas and water and boiling point Compound.Specifically, above-mentioned solvent material can be containing ethanol, methanol, IPA (isopropanol), The organic compound of at least one in acetone, acetic acid, methane, ethane, propane and butane.

In this case, the solvent of the organic compound as solvent material is contained to the supply of the surface of substrate Steam.Organic compound can make fluohydric acid gas and water dissolution in wherein, and has lower than the boiling point of water Boiling point.Therefore, even if adsorption moisture is attached to the surface of substrate, this adsorption moisture is also being dissolved in base Evaporate together with organic compound after organic compound on plate.Thus, from substrate, moisture is removed. Similarly, even if Organic substance is attached to the surface of substrate, this Organic substance also steams together with organic compound Send out, thus from substrate, remove this Organic substance.Research according to present inventor it is known that with moisture with Sample ground, when Organic substance is attached to the surface of substrate, when supplying etchant vapor to the surface of substrate Time, the uniformity of etching may be made to reduce.Therefore, by removing Organic substance on substrate, it is possible to enter one Step improves the uniformity of etching.

Above-mentioned etching work procedure can also include: to the supply of the surface of the substrate covered by above-mentioned liquid film containing fluorine Change the operation of the above-mentioned etchant vapor of hydrogen and above-mentioned solvent material.

According to the method, to the supply of the surface of the substrate covered by the liquid film containing solvent material containing fluorination Hydrogen and the etchant vapor of solvent material.That is, to the supply of the surface of substrate containing identical with the material on substrate The etchant vapor of the material of kind.Therefore, high with the liquid affinity on substrate to the supply of the surface of substrate Etchant vapor.The etchant vapor supplying the surface to substrate is adsorbed in the surface of substrate, is formed containing fluorine Change the condensed phase of hydrogen.Research according to present inventor is it is known that the degree of absorption of etchant vapor depends on The wettability of substrate.And, contain fluohydric acid gas according to the research of present inventor it is known that pass through supply With the etchant vapor of solvent material, with supply contain only fluohydric acid gas etchant vapor situation compared with, it is possible to The condensed phase containing fluohydric acid gas is formed equably on substrate.Therefore, contained by the supply to the surface of substrate There are fluohydric acid gas and the etchant vapor of solvent material, it is possible to improve the uniformity of etching further.

Aforesaid substrate processing method can include that operation repeatedly, above-mentioned operation repeatedly are will to include above-mentioned liquid film One circulation of formation process and above-mentioned etching work procedure carries out operation repeatedly.

According to the method, the action of supply solvent steam and supply etchant vapor dynamic are alternately repeated Make.To the surface of the substrate covered by the liquid film containing solvent material supply etchant vapor.Lost by supply Carving steam, the liquid film on substrate little by little evaporates.Therefore, interrupt supplying etchant vapor, again to substrate Supply solvent steam to substrate, it is possible to supplement solvent material to substrate.Therefore, it is possible to suppression or Prevent the situation to substrate supply etchant vapor when a part for substrate surface is exposed.Thus, The uniformity that can suppress or prevent etching reduces.

It can be the substrate being formed with nitride film on surface by the substrate of aforesaid substrate disposal methods.

In this case, in the state of the nitride film being covered substrate surface by the liquid film containing solvent material Under, etchant vapor is supplied to the surface of substrate.Nitride film is etched vapor etch.Therefore, it is possible to uniformly Ground etching nitride film.

It addition, can also be to be formed with nitride film on surface by the substrate of aforesaid substrate disposal methods And the substrate of oxide-film.

In this case, at nitride film and the oxygen being covered substrate surface by the liquid film containing solvent material Under the state changing film, supply etchant vapor to the surface of substrate.With regard to the rate of etch (etching in the unit interval Amount) i.e. for etching speed, oxide-film is lower than nitride film.And, according to the research of present inventor It is known that covered the surface of substrate by liquid film, make the apparent condition that substrate holding is good, it is possible to Suppress or prevent from etching too much the situation of oxide-film.Therefore, by the liquid film containing solvent material Cover under the nitride film of substrate surface and the state of oxide-film, supply etchant vapor to the surface of substrate, It is possible to carry high selectivity (rate of etch of the rate of etch/oxide-film of nitride film).

The most above-mentioned liquid film forming operation is to supply above-mentioned solvent steam in confined space to the surface of substrate Operation.Similarly, the most above-mentioned etching work procedure is above-mentioned to the supply of the surface of substrate in confined space The operation of etchant vapor.The action of supply solvent steam and the action of supply etchant vapor, can be identical Chamber in carry out, it is also possible to carry out in respective chamber.That is, action and the confession of solvent steam are supplied To the action of etchant vapor, can carry out in identical confined space, it is also possible at respective confined air Carry out between.Either in the case of which kind of, can be efficiently to substrate supply solvent steam and erosion Carve steam, therefore, it is possible to reduce solvent steam and the consumption of etchant vapor further.

It addition, above-mentioned liquid film forming operation can include to the supply of the surface of substrate containing above-mentioned organic compound The operation of the above-mentioned solvent steam of in thing and water, above-mentioned etching work procedure includes following operation: To the surface of the substrate covered by the above-mentioned liquid film containing in above-mentioned organic compound and water, supply Give the above-mentioned etchant vapor containing another in above-mentioned organic compound and water He fluohydric acid gas.Such as, Can also after the substrate supply solvent steam containing water, to substrate supply containing organic compound and The etchant vapor of fluohydric acid gas.

As it has been described above, organic compound can make water dissolution wherein, and volatility is high.Therefore, when When substrate supply organic compound, the moisture on substrate evaporates together with organic compound, thus reduces Water quantities on substrate.On the other hand, when supplying feedwater to substrate, the water quantities on substrate increases.Fluorine Change hydrogen to react with substrate in the environment of there is water, substrate is etched.Now required water Component has most preferred scope.Therefore, the organic compound of change supply to substrate and the amount of water, It is possible to control the water quantities on substrate.Thereby, it is possible to suppress or prevent rate of etch from reducing.

Other embodiments of the present invention provide a kind of substrate board treatment, including: substrate holding unit, For keeping substrate；Organic compound feed unit, to the substrate kept by aforesaid substrate holding unit Surface supplies the steam of specific organic compound, and wherein, above-mentioned specific organic compound is can be molten Solve fluohydric acid gas and water and the boiling point low-boiling organic compound than water；Pure water vapor feed unit, to The surface supply pure water vapor of the substrate kept by aforesaid substrate holding unit；Etchant vapor feed unit, To the surface of the substrate kept by the aforesaid substrate holding unit supply etchant vapor containing fluohydric acid gas；Control Device (controller), supplies by controlling above-mentioned organic compound steam feed unit and pure water vapor Unit performs liquid film forming operation, and performs etching work procedure by controlling above-mentioned etchant vapor feed unit, And perform to make the circulation including above-mentioned liquid film forming operation and above-mentioned etching work procedure carry out repeatedly is anti- Return to work sequence, in above-mentioned liquid film forming operation, supply the steam of above-mentioned organic compound to the surface of substrate Or pure water vapor, make water that the adhering on surface of substrate and/or Organic substance be dissolved in above-mentioned organic compound Or pure water, the liquid film coming the liquid film by above-mentioned organic compound or pure water covers the surface of substrate, thus Water and/or organic state is had to become the surface of substrate from the surface attachment at substrate in uniform thickness The state that liquid film covers, in above-mentioned etching work procedure, to covered by the liquid film containing above-mentioned solvent material The surface of substrate supplies above-mentioned etchant vapor.According to this structure, it is possible to play as above-mentioned effect Effect.

Above-mentioned solvent steam feed unit can also be to the surface of the substrate kept by aforesaid substrate holding unit The supply above-mentioned solvent steam containing above-mentioned solvent material, the most above-mentioned solvent material can dissolve fluohydric acid gas And water.According to this structure, it is possible to play the effect as above-mentioned effect.

Above-mentioned solvent steam feed unit can also be to the surface of the substrate kept by aforesaid substrate holding unit The supply above-mentioned solvent steam containing the organic compound as above-mentioned solvent material, wherein, above-mentioned organic Compound can dissolve fluohydric acid gas and water and boiling point is lower than the boiling point of water.According to this structure, it is possible to play With the effect as above-mentioned effect.

Above-mentioned etchant vapor feed unit can also include mixed cell, and this mixed cell is above-mentioned molten by making Matchmaker's steam and above-mentioned etchant vapor mix, and generate containing above-mentioned solvent steam and above-mentioned etchant vapor Mixed vapour, and above-mentioned mixed vapour guides to by aforesaid substrate holding unit by above-mentioned mixed cell The substrate kept.In this case, above-mentioned control device can also perform to include the above-mentioned erosion of certain working procedure Carving operation, this certain working procedure is to supply to the surface of the substrate covered by the liquid film containing above-mentioned solvent material The operation of above-mentioned mixed vapour.According to this structure, it is possible to play the effect as above-mentioned effect.

Above-mentioned control device can also perform operation repeatedly, above-mentioned operation repeatedly is will to include above-mentioned liquid film One circulation of formation process and above-mentioned etching work procedure carries out operation repeatedly.According to this structure, it is possible to rise To the effect as above-mentioned effect.

By referring to accompanying drawing and the explanation of embodiment that carries out below, that comes in the clear and definite present invention is above-mentioned Or other purpose, feature and effect.

Accompanying drawing explanation

Fig. 1 is the signal of the schematic configuration of the substrate board treatment illustrating an embodiment of the invention Figure.

Fig. 2 is the flow chart for the first process example is described.

Fig. 3 is the flow chart for the second process example is described.

Fig. 4 is the flow chart for the 3rd process example is described.

Fig. 5 is the flow chart for fourth process example is described.

Fig. 6 is in the case of the forward direction substrate being shown in and being etched operation supplies IPA steam and to be not intended for To selecting than the chart with etch quantity in the case of IPA steam.

Fig. 7 is in the case of the forward direction substrate being shown in and being etched operation supplies DIW steam and to be not intended for To selecting than the chart with etch quantity in the case of DIW steam.

Fig. 8 is in the case of the forward direction substrate being shown in and being etched operation supplies IPA steam and to be not intended for Chart to the uniformity of the etching in the case of IPA steam.

Fig. 9 is in the case of the forward direction substrate being shown in and being etched operation supplies DIW steam and to be not intended for Chart to the uniformity of the etching in the case of DIW steam.

Detailed description of the invention

Fig. 1 is the signal of the schematic configuration of the substrate board treatment 1 illustrating an embodiment of the invention Figure.

Substrate board treatment 1 is the single sheet type one by one processing the discoideus substrate W such as semiconductor wafer Substrate board treatment.Substrate board treatment 1 has: processing unit 2, is used for processing substrate W；Control Device 3, for controlling the action of the device that substrate board treatment 1 is had and the opening and closing of valve.

Processing unit 2 is that the steam containing fluohydric acid gas is supplied the steam treated unit to substrate W.Process Unit 2 includes: HF steam generation container 4 (etchant vapor feed unit), is used for storing Fluohydric acid. (liquid Body)；Chamber 5, is used for housing HF steam generation container 4.The concentration of Fluohydric acid. is adjusted to become institute Call the concentration (such as under 1 atmospheric pressure and room temperature, about 39.6%) of quasi-azeotropic composition.HF steam is sent out The HF heater 6 that Fluohydric acid. in raw container 4 is built in HF steam generation container 4 heats. The temperature of the Fluohydric acid. in HF steam generation container 4 is controlled by controlling device 3.

Processing unit 2 also includes: pressed sheet (perforated plate) 7, is configured at HF steam and occurs The lower section of container 4；Heating plate 8, is configured at the lower section of pressed sheet 7.Heating plate 8 is to maintain substrate W An example of substrate holding unit, and be also an example of the substrate heater adding hot substrate W.Heating Plate 8 is so that the upper surface of substrate W keeps this substrate W with pressed sheet 7 status level ground in opposite directions.Base Plate W is while heated plate 8 heats, and heated plate 8 supports.Substrate is made by controlling device 3 The temperature of W maintains the stationary temperature of (such as, 30 DEG C～100 DEG C) within the limits prescribed.Heating Plate 8 is fixed on the upper end of rotary shaft 9.When the rotary drive mechanism 10 including motor etc. makes rotary shaft 9 During rotation, heating plate 8 rotates around vertical axis together with rotary shaft 9.Thus, heated plate 8 is protected The substrate W held passes around the vertical axis at the center of substrate W and rotates.

Processing unit 2 also has the corrugated tube 11 of tubular, and the corrugated tube 11 of this tubular is configured at heating plate 8 Around.Heating plate 8 is configured at the inner side of corrugated tube 11.Corrugated tube 11 can stretch up and down.Do not scheme The drive mechanism shown makes corrugated tube 11 at closed position (position shown in solid) and retreating position (dotted line Shown position) between flexible, wherein, above-mentioned closed position refers to, the upper edge of corrugated tube 11 and punching press Plate 7 abuts against and the space of the surrounding of heating plate 8 is by airtight position, and above-mentioned retreating position refers to, ripple The upper edge of pipe 11 retreats to the position of the lower section of the upper surface of heating plate 8.Space in corrugated tube 11 It is connected with exhaust apparatus 13 via the exhaustor 12 being connected with the bottom surface of chamber 5.Pass through exhaust apparatus 13 discharge the gas in corrugated tube 11.

It addition, chamber 5 includes baffle plate 15, this baffle plate 15 is formed at the sidewall of chamber 5 for opening and closing Opening 14.Opening 14 is configured at the side of heating plate 8.When moving into substrate W to processing unit 2, First, corrugated tube 11 is configured at retreating position (position shown in dotted line), and opening 14 is opened. Then, in this condition, by the conveying robot (not shown) of carrying substrate W, substrate W is removed Enter to chamber 5.Then, opening 14 is closed by baffle plate 15.On the other hand, removing from chamber 5 When going out substrate W, corrugated tube 11 is configured at retreating position, and opening 14 is opened.Then, at this shape Under state, take out of substrate W by conveying robot.Then, opening 14 is closed by baffle plate 15.

HF steam generation container 4 includes: steam occurs space 16, (is made hydrogen fluorine by the steam of Fluohydric acid. The gas that acid evaporation produces) it is full of；Stream 18 (mixed cell), sends out with steam via communicating valve 17 Raw space 16 is connected.HF steam generation container 4 with first flow controller 19 and is installed First pipe arrangement 21 of one valve 20 is connected.HF steam generation container 4 is via the first pipe arrangement 21 and first Nitrogen supply source 22 is connected.Nitrogen as carrier gas and an example of non-active gas is joined via first Pipe 21 supplies to steam generation space 16.Similarly, stream 18 with second flow controller 23 is installed And second second pipe arrangement 25 of valve 24 be connected.Stream 18 is via the second pipe arrangement 25 and the second nitrogen Supply source 26 is connected.Nitrogen supplies to stream 18 via the second pipe arrangement 25.

Second pipe arrangement 25 is (molten with the 3rd pipe arrangement being provided with the 3rd flow controller 27 and the 3rd valve 28 Matchmaker's steam feed unit) 29 it is connected.3rd pipe arrangement 29 in the downstream of the second valve 24 (by stream 18 Side) it is connected with the second pipe arrangement 25.Stream 18 via the second pipe arrangement 25 and the 3rd pipe arrangement 29 with IPA steam feed unit 30 is connected.IPA steam feed unit 30 includes: IPA groove 31, storage There is IPA (liquid)；Gas pipe arrangement 32, supplies nitrogen in IPA groove 31.3rd pipe arrangement 29 and IPA Groove 31 is connected.When supplying nitrogen from gas pipe arrangement 32 to IPA groove 31, IPA produces gas Bubble, thus generate IPA steam (containing vaporific IPA and the gas of nitrogen).Then, IPA steam The 3rd pipe arrangement 29 is flowed into from IPA groove 31.Organic solvent in being stored in IPA groove 31 is noninflammability Organic solvent in the case of, IPA steam feed unit 30 is not limited to above-mentioned structure, it is also possible to be The structure of organic solvent evaporation in IPA groove 31 is made by heater 33 (with reference to double dot dash line).

IPA is to dissolve fluohydric acid gas and water, and boiling point is lower than the boiling point of water and little the organising of molecular weight One example of compound (organic solvent).Such organic compound is not limited to IPA, can be ethanol, Some in methanol, acetone, acetic acid, methane, ethane, propane and butane, it is also possible to be containing Two or more in ethanol, methanol, IPA, acetone, acetic acid, methane, ethane, propane and butane Compound.

Second pipe arrangement 25 also with the 4th flow controller 34 and the 4th pipe arrangement of the 4th valve 35 is installed (solvent steam feed unit) 36 is connected.4th pipe arrangement 36 is in the downstream and second of the second valve 24 Pipe arrangement 25 is connected.Stream 18 supplies with DIW steam via the second pipe arrangement 25 and the 4th pipe arrangement 36 Unit 37 is connected.DIW steam feed unit 37 includes: pure water groove 38, is stored with pure water (liquid Body)；Gas pipe arrangement 39, supplies nitrogen in pure water groove 38.4th pipe arrangement 36 and pure water groove 38 phase Connect.When supplying nitrogen from gas pipe arrangement 39 to pure water groove 38, pure water produces bubble, thus Generate DIW steam (containing vaporific pure water and the gas of nitrogen).Then, DIW steam is from pure water Groove 38 flows into the 4th pipe arrangement 36.DIW steam feed unit 37 is not limited to above-mentioned structure, also Can be to make the evaporating pure water in pure water groove 38 produce DIW by heater 40 (with reference to double dot dash line) The structure of steam (steam).

Communicating valve the 17, first valve the 20, second valve the 24, the 3rd valve 28 and the 4th valve 35, filled by control Put 3 controls to carry out opening and closing.When opening communicating valve 17 and the first valve 20, by from The air-flow of the nitrogen of the first nitrogen supply source 22, makes to swim in steam and Fluohydric acid. in space 16 occurs Steam supplies to stream 18 via communicating valve 17.Therefore, open communicating valve the 17, first valve 20 and Under the state of the second valve 24 and closedown the 3rd valve 28 and the 4th valve 35, by supplying from the second nitrogen The air-flow of the nitrogen in source 26, is fed to HF steam (steam containing Fluohydric acid. and the nitrogen of stream 18 The gas of gas) guide to pressed sheet 7.Thus, HF steam is through being formed at the multiple through of pressed sheet 7 Hole blows the upper surface of the substrate W to the holding of heated plate 8.

It addition, when opening the 3rd valve 28, the IPA from IPA steam feed unit 30 steams Gas supplies to stream 18.Similarly, when opening the 4th valve 35, supply from DIW steam The DIW steam of unit 37 supplies to stream 18.Therefore, the 3rd valve 28 and the 4th valve 35 is being opened In one and close communicating valve the 17, first valve the 20, second valve 24 state under, IPA steam or DIW steam blows the upper surface to substrate W.On the other hand, the 3rd valve 28 and the 4th valve is being opened In 35 one and open communicating valve the 17, first valve the 20, second valve 24 state under, IPA steam and HF steam mixes in stream 18, or DIW steam and HF steam are carried out in stream 18 Mixing, thus blow to base containing IPA and the steam of fluohydric acid gas or the steam containing pure water and fluohydric acid gas The upper surface of plate W.And, when opening all valve 17,20,24,28,35, IPA Steam, DIW steam and HF steam mix in stream 18, containing IPA, pure water and fluorine The steam changing hydrogen blows the upper surface to substrate W.

inventionTitles.title: Naringenin fatty acid ester, its preparation method and the pharmaceutical composition with this compound as active component and application thereof
柚皮素脂肪酸酯、其制备方法和以该化合物为活性成分的药物组合物及其应用

event-title.$: GRANT OF PATENT OR UTILITY MODEL
TRANSFER OF PATENT APPLICATION OR PATENT RIGHT OR UTILITY MODEL

section.content: 本发明公开了柚皮素脂肪酸酯，是将柚皮素5位羟基酯化得到的柚皮素‑5‑O‑脂肪酸酯。本发明同时公开了柚皮素‑5‑O‑脂肪酸酯的制备方法，以其为活性成分制备的药物组合物，以及在抑制ADP、AA和胶原诱导的血小板聚集方面和血小板聚集引起的心血管疾病方面的应用。

The invention discloses naringenin fatty acid ester, be the naringenin 5 O fatty acid ester that 5 hydroxy esterifications of naringenin are obtained.The present invention discloses the preparation method of naringenin 5 O fatty acid ester, which is pharmaceutical composition prepared by active component, and the application in terms of suppression ADP, AA and collagen-induced platelet aggregation and in terms of the angiocardiopathy that causes of platelet aggregation.

Naringenin fatty acid ester, its preparation method and the medicine with this compound as active component Compositions and application thereofTechnical field

The present invention relates to field of pharmaceutical chemistry technology, particularly relate to naringenin-5-O-fatty acid ester, its preparation method, with This compound is the pharmaceutical composition of active component, and their application in terms of platelet aggregation-against.

Background technology

Naringenin is a class natural flavone compounds, is widely present in that the dried immature fruit of citron orange, Exocarpium Citri Grandis, peach leaf, chinaroot greenbrier etc. are natural to be planted In thing, and toxic and side effect is low, and extraction and separation process is ripe simple.Naringenin is the glucoside unit of naringin, belongs to flavanone chemical combination Thing, has antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, removing free radical, anti-oxidant, cough-relieving apophlegmatic, reducing blood lipid, anticancer antitumor, spasmolysis and cholagogic, prevention Act on treatment hepatopathy, anti-platelet clotting, anti-congee sample artery sclerosis etc., the neck such as medicine, food can be widely used in Territory.

1. antibacterial: stronger antibacterial action is had to staphylococcus aureus, large intestine, dysentery and typhoid bacillus.Naringenin Also have effect to fungi, 1000ppm is sprayed on rice and can reduce rice blast fungus infection 40-90%, and does not has toxicity to people and domestic animal.

2. anti-inflammatory: rat abdominal cavity injects 20mg/kg every day, hence it is evident that the inflammatory process caused by wool ball is implanted in suppression. Galati et al. is by the experiment discovery of mouse auricle, and naringenin each dosage group all has antiphlogistic effects, increases with dosage, antiphlogistic effects Strengthen.The inhibiting rate of high dose group, is 30.67% with thickness difference index, then reaches about 38% with weight difference for index.Feng Baomin Deng using after DNFB method inducing mouse 3 phase dermatitis, the 2nd～8 day continuous oral gives naringenin, observations i.e. phase (IPR), slow Send out the inhibiting rate of phase (LPR) and super tardy phase (vLPR).The ear edge edema to IPR, vLPR for the naringenin produces effective suppression, Anti-inflammatory aspect has certain Development volue.

3. remove free radical and antioxidation: DPPH (DPPH.free radical) is a kind of stable freedom Base, borrows its 517nm extinction dough softening can evaluate the ability removing free radical.Kroyer is turned into by testing the antioxygen to naringenin With being studied, it was demonstrated that naringenin has antioxidation.Zhang Haide et al. experiment uses colorimetric method for determining LDL that lipid occurs Snperoxiaized process, determines the ability of suppression LDL oxidative modification.And elaborate naringenin mainly by 4 carbonyl chelatings Cu2+, or provide proton to neutralize with free radical, or by autoxidation, the lipid peroxidation of LDL is shielded.? Hai De et al. uses DPPH method discovery naringenin to have good effect of scavenging radical, and the effect removing free radical is probably logical Cross what naringenin self realized for hydroxide.Peng Shuhui et al. uses riboflavin (IR) NBT (NBT) AAS experimental model, proves naringenin to active oxygen O2-Having obvious scavenging action, elimination effect is better than sun Property comparison ascorbic acid.Results of animal shows, mouse brain, the heart, the lipid peroxidation of hepatic tissue are had stronger by naringenin Inhibitory action, can be remarkably reinforced superoxide dismutase (SOD) activity of Mouse whole blood.

4. effect for reducing blood fat: Zhang Haide et al. is by the serum cholesterol of small white mouse vein after zoopery detection perfusion (TC), the items such as LDL-C (LDL-C), plasma hdl cholesterol (HDL-C), triglycerides (TG) Mesh, test result indicate that, under certain dosage, naringenin can make serum TC, TG, LDL-C be remarkably decreased, and relatively improves blood Clear HDL-C, illustrates that naringenin has the effect of reducing blood lipid to small white mouse.

As the selection of a kind of optimization, described R is methyl, ethyl, n-propyl, the one in normal-butyl.

Structural formula is as follows respectively:

Invention also provides the preparation method of naringenin-5-O-fatty acid ester, details are as follows.

The synthetic route of naringenin-5-O-fatty acid ester is as follows:

The synthetic method of naringenin-5-O-fatty acid ester, comprises the steps:

S1, with naringenin as initiation material, in anhydrous organic solvent, using alkaline reagent as catalyst, with cylite Reaction obtains corresponding 7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin (II)；

In this step, described organic solvent includes acetonitrile, DMF, dichloromethane, methyl tertiary butyl ether(MTBE) In one or more, described alkaline reagent includes triethylamine, pyridine, Na2CO3、K2CO3In one；

S2, described 7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin, in anhydrous organic solvent, using alkaline reagent as catalyst, Obtain corresponding 5-O-fatty acyl group-7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin (III) with acid anhydrides or acyl chloride reaction；

In this step, described organic solvent includes acetonitrile, DMF, dichloromethane, methyl tertiary butyl ether(MTBE) In one or more, described alkaline reagent includes triethylamine, pyridine, Na2CO3、K2CO3In one；

S3, described 5-O-fatty acyl group-7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin, in organic solvent, in absorption in absorption Under the catalytic action of the transition metal series catalysts in agent, hydrogenating reduction obtains corresponding naringenin fatty acid ester, the i.e. present invention The naringenin-5-O-fatty acid ester (I) of indication；

In this step, described organic solvent includes one or more in dioxane, ethanol, methyl alcohol, oxolane；Institute State transition metal series catalysts and include palladium system, molybdenum system, cadmium system, copper system, the one in nickel catalyst.

As the technical scheme of a kind of optimization, the synthetic method of naringenin-5-O-fatty acid ester, detailed step is as follows:

S1, the feed concentrations of naringenin are 0.05～0.5mol/L；The feed concentrations of base catalyst is 0.1～ 1.0mol/L；The feed concentrations of cylite is 0.1～1.0mol/L；Reaction temperature is 10～100 DEG C；After reaction completely, reaction Liquid is poured in frozen water, adjusts pH=6 with 10wt% acetic acid solution, filters, and washes filter cake with water until neutrality, obtains 7,4 '-O, O- Dibenzyl naringenin；

S2,7,4 '-O, the feed concentrations of O-dibenzyl naringenin is 0.008～0.08mol/L；Feeding intake of base catalyst Concentration is 0.016～0.16mol/L；The feed concentrations of acid anhydrides or acyl chlorides is 0.02～0.2mol/L；Reaction temperature is 10～100 ℃；After reaction completely, product uses aqueous hydrochloric acid solution, saturated Na successively2CO3The aqueous solution and pure water washing, collected organic layer, very Empty desolventizing, obtains 5-O-fatty acyl group-7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin；

The feed concentrations of S3,5-O-fatty acyl group-7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin is 0.0008～0.008mol/L； 5-O-fatty acyl group-7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin is (2～20) with the mass ratio of transition metal series catalysts: 1；At hydrogen Atmosphere is reacted；Reaction temperature is 10～100 DEG C；Reaction time is 4～10 hours；Filtering to get filtrate, vacuum desolvation agent obtains shaddock Pi Su-5-O-fatty acid ester.

Naringenin-5-O-fatty acid ester crude product the dry method preparing above step is splined on polyamide chromatographic column, utilizes two Chloromethanes-methanol elution gradient, obtains naringenin-5-O-fatty acid ester sterling.

In above-mentioned steps S1, S2, the reaction time all monitors reaction process, solvent: second with GF254 silica gel thin-layer chromatography plate Acetoacetic ester/acetone/glacial acetic acid (6:6:1.5), naringenin or 5-O-fatty acyl group-7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin spot disappears Lose, illustrate that reaction completes.

As a kind of technical scheme more optimizing, the step of preferable preparation method is as follows:

S1, the feed concentrations of naringenin are 0.3mol/L；The feed concentrations of base catalyst is 0.6mol/L；Cylite Feed concentrations is 0.6mol/L；Reaction temperature is 40 DEG C；After reaction complete (generally 4 hours), reactant liquor is poured in frozen water, uses 10wt% acetic acid solution adjusts pH=6, filters, and washes filter cake with water until neutrality, obtains 7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin；

S2,7,4 '-O, the feed concentrations of O-dibenzyl naringenin is 0.02mol/L；The feed concentrations of base catalyst is 0.04mol/L；The feed concentrations of acid anhydrides or acyl chlorides is 0.04mol/L；Reaction temperature is 25 DEG C；(generally 4 is little completely in reaction When) after, product uses aqueous hydrochloric acid solution, saturated Na successively2CO3The aqueous solution and pure water washing, collected organic layer, vacuum desolvation agent, Obtain 5-O-fatty acyl group-7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin；

The feed concentrations of S3,5-O-fatty acyl group-7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin is 0.004mol/L；5-O-fat Acyl group-7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin is 10:1 with the mass ratio of transition metal series catalysts；Nitrogen atmosphere is reacted；Reaction temperature Degree is 25 DEG C；Reaction time is 6 hours；Filtering to get filtrate, vacuum desolvation agent obtains naringenin-5-O-fatty acid ester crude product, will be thick Product dry method is splined on polyamide chromatographic column, utilizes methylene chloride-methanol gradient elution, obtains naringenin-5-O-fatty acid ester sterling.

In above method, when acid anhydrides or acyl chlorides use variety classes just can prepare smoothly accordingly, as described above Naringenin-5-O-acetic acid esters, naringenin-5-O-propionic ester, naringenin-5-O-n-butyric acie ester, the positive valeric acid of naringenin-5-O- Ester.

For example, when the acid anhydrides using is acetic anhydride, then corresponding naringenin-5-O-acetic acid esters can be prepared smoothly, When the acyl chlorides using is propionyl chloride, then can prepare corresponding naringenin-5-O-propionic ester smoothly, when the acyl chlorides using is During n-butyryl chloride, then can prepare corresponding naringenin-5-O-n-butyric acie ester smoothly, and when the acyl chlorides using is n-amyl chloride When, then can prepare the positive valerate of corresponding naringenin-5-O-smoothly.

7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin (0.008mol, 3.62g) are dissolved in anhydrous methyl uncle with the concentration of 0.02mol/L In butyl ether, add triethylamine (0.016mol, 2.23mL) with the concentration of 0.04mol/L, with the concentration of 0.04mol/L under ice bath Being slowly added dropwise acetic anhydride (0.016mol, 1.50mL), dropping finishes rear chamber temperature 25 DEG C reaction.With GF254 silica gel thin-layer chromatography plate Monitoring reaction process, solvent: ethyl acetate/acetone/glacial acetic acid (6:6:1.5).7,4 '-O after reacting 4 hours, O-dibenzyl Naringenin spot disappears, and illustrates that acylation reaction is complete.Product uses aqueous hydrochloric acid solution, saturated NaCO successively3The aqueous solution and pure water Washing, collected organic layer, vacuum desolvation agent, obtain 5-O-acetyl group-7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin (3.62g, 91.43%).

7,4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin (0.008mol, 3.62g) are dissolved in anhydrous methyl uncle with the concentration of 0.08mol/L In butyl ether, add triethylamine (0.016mol, 2.23mL) with the concentration of 0.16mol/L, with the concentration of 0.16mol/L under ice bath Being slowly added dropwise n-amyl chloride (0.016mol, 2.00mL), dropping finishes latter 35 DEG C reactions.With GF254 silica gel thin-layer chromatography plate prison Measured reaction process, solvent: ethyl acetate/acetone/glacial acetic acid (6:6:1.5).7,4 '-O after reacting 2.5 hours, O-dibenzyl Naringenin spot disappears, and illustrates that acylation reaction is complete.Product uses aqueous hydrochloric acid solution, saturated NaCO successively3The aqueous solution and pure water Washing, collected organic layer, vacuum desolvation agent, obtain positive valeryl-7 of 5-O-, 4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin (2.76g, 64.31%).

(3) synthesis of the positive valerate of naringenin-5-O-

Positive valeryl-7 of 5-O-, 4 '-O, O-dibenzyl naringenin (0.005mol, 2.68g) are with the concentration of 0.001mol/L It is dissolved in dioxane/ethanol (volume ratio 1:1), add palladium-carbon catalyst (0.179g), nitrogen atmosphere room temperature with mass ratio for 15:1 25 DEG C are reacted 8 hours, filter to get filtrate, and vacuum desolvation agent obtains the positive valerate of naringenin-5-O-.Crude product dry method is splined on polyamide Chromatographic column, methylene chloride-methanol gradient elution, obtain naringenin-5-O-positive valerate sterling (0.92g, 51.67%).

Fusing point 151-153 DEG C.

ESI-MS:357.3 [M+H]+。

13C-NMR(DMSO-d6, 600MHz) and δ: 189.8 (C-4), 172.6 (C=O, acetyl group), 162.6 (C-7), 158.6 (C-9), 152.9 (C-4 '), 150.2 (C-5), 128.6 (C-1 ') 124.6 (C-2', C-6'), 110.4 (C-3 ', C- 5’),96.7(C-8),74.9(C-2),40.2(C-3),38.8(CH2),21.7(CH2),18.5(CH3)。

Elementary analysis: C68.12%, H5.23%, composition and chemical formula C20H20O6Unanimously.

Conclusion: naringenin-5-O-acetic acid esters, naringenin-5-O-propionic ester, naringenin-5-O-n-butyric acie ester, naringenin- The positive valerate of 3-O-is respectively provided with the effect of internal suppression platelet aggregation, wherein naringenin-5-O-acetic acid esters and naringenin-5-O- The effect of propionic ester is more than naringenin.
