inventionTitles.title: For Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution and preparation method
用于吸附重金属离子、有机污染物的改性纤维素材料及制备方法

address.address1: Suzhou City, Jiangsu province 215137 Xiangcheng District Ji Road No. 8
Suzhou City, Jiangsu province 215137 Xiangcheng District Ji Road No. 8
Suzhou Liangcai Sci & Tech Co. Ltd

event-title.$: TERMINATION OF PATENT RIGHT DUE TO NON-PAYMENT OF ANNUAL FEE
GRANT OF PATENT OR UTILITY MODEL

section.content: 本发明公开了种用于吸附重金属离子、有机污染物的改性纤维素材料及制备方法。以纤维素为原料，经碱活化得碱化纤维素；再以硝酸铈铵和偶氮二异丁腈作复合引发剂，将单体2‑氰基‑3‑乙氧基丙烯酸乙酯接枝至碱化纤维素上；采用羟胺溶液对其胺肟化改性，制备得到种既含偕胺肟基团又包含羟胺肟基团的改性纤维素材料。本发明原料价廉易得，制备工艺简单、操作易控，便于批量生产；该材料可用于吸附废水中重金属离子、有机污染物。

The invention discloses a kind of for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution and preparation method.With cellulose as raw material, activate to obtain alkalinized celluloses through alkali；Make composite initiator with ammonium ceric nitrate and azodiisobutyronitrile again, monomer 2 cyano group 3 ethoxy ethyl acrylate is grafted on alkalinized celluloses；Use hydroxylamine solution modified to its amidoximeization, prepare a kind of not only containing amidoxime group but also the modified cellulosic materials that comprises azanol oximido group.Raw material of the present invention is cheap and easy to get, and preparation technology is simple, easy controlled operation, it is simple to batch production；This material can be used for adsorbing heavy metal ions in wastewater, organic pollution.

For Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution and preparation method Technical field

The present invention relates to a kind of for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution and preparation method, be specifically related to the modified cellulosic material of a kind of amidoxim-azanol oxime and preparation method, belong to functional high molecule material technical field.

Background technology

In recent years, environment and resource problem day are becoming tight, and on the one hand with heavy metal ion and organic pollution, the water as representative pollutes more severe；And it is on the other hand limited with coal and the oil non-renewable resources deposit as representative, and ecological environment is made a very bad impression by its development and utilization, for solving the problems referred to above, acting on " Green Chemistry " and " ecological harmonious " theory, researchers have turned one's attention to natural polymer child resource.Cellulose is as a kind of threadiness, the stereospecificity biomass resource of multiple capillary, possess the characteristics such as cheap and easy to get, biodegradable, environmental friendliness, additionally, the architectural feature of porous and bigger serface makes cellulose can act also as the carrier of several functions material.Cellulosic molecule formula (C6H10O5) n, it is each other with β-1 by a lot of D-Glucopyranose .s, the linear macromolecule polysaccharide that 4 glycosidic bonds are formed by connecting, each glucose unit contains 3 polar hydroxyl groups, abundant oh group makes it form a large amount of hydrogen bond structure at molecule interchain and intramolecule, in addition the aggregated structure of native cellulose and the feature of higher crystallinity, greatly have impact on reactivity, its absorbability is caused to be restricted, therefore, for fully excavating the absorption property of cellulose, can be structurally-modified to it by a series of chemical reactions relevant with hydroxyl.

Amidoxime group is because having special structure, and the lone pair electrons in its chain link are to forming stable chelate ring with metal ion generation coordination chelation.Amidoxime group includes that amidoxime group and azanol oximido roll into a ball two kinds, amidoxime group (R-C (NH2)=N-OH) chain link in containing amido and oximido double coordination group, there are lone pair electrons pair, all can produce coordination chelation with metal ion, Rima Saliba etc. are with amidoxim cellulose for investigating object, probe into it and different metal ion and the adsorption effect of dyestuff and adsorption mechanism (are seen document: Cellulose, 2002,9 (2): 183-191)；Azanol oxime (hydroxamic acid) group has two kinds of structures: enol form (R-C (OH)=N-OH) and keto-acid ((R-C (O) NH-OH), enol form is unstable, therefore often exist with keto-acid, azanol oxime is also a kind of typical chelating agen, is day by day taken seriously in flocculation separation field.At present, relatively fewer to the report of azanol oxime both at home and abroad, Md Jelas Haron etc. with monkey grass as base material, H2O2/Fe2+Make initiator, monomer methyl acrylate is grafted on monkey grass skeleton, use oxammonium hydrochloride. by its amidoxime subsequently, obtain azanol oximido monkey grass, and investigate it to Cu in aqueous solution2+Removal ability (see document: Bioresources, 2009, 4(4): 1305-1318).Amidoxim and azanol oximido group all have concentration and separation noble metal and rare metal, the functions such as the test analysis of purification of waste water and trace metal element, if doing carrier with cellulose again, the porous that so this material will combine amidoxime group height selectivity and cellulose carrier has, the advantage such as bigger serface and high mechanical properties, but so far, the technical scheme being concurrently present in cellulose about amidoxime group and azanol oximido group has no report, how amidoxim and azanol oximido are rolled into a ball grafting simultaneously to natural polymer cellulose, become the problem that research and development functional cellulose macromolecular material is in the urgent need to address.

Summary of the invention

The present invention is directed to the deficiency that prior art exists, it is provided that one had not only contained amidoxime group but also comprised azanol oximido group, had collaborative reinforced effects, for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution and preparation method.

For achieving the above object, technical scheme provided by the present invention, for providing a kind of for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the preparation method of the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution, comprises the steps:

1, cellulose alkalization: cellulose is placed in the NaOH solution that concentration is 0.5～5wt% by bath raio 1:10～1:100, kiering 30～150min under conditions of temperature is 80～100 DEG C, after taking out drainage, it is placed in the NaOH solution that concentration is 10～30wt% by bath raio 1:20～1:50, under conditions of temperature is 20～30 DEG C, stirring or concussion process 60～180min, then through filtration, deionized water wash, drying, obtain alkalinized celluloses；

2, graft copolymerization: alkalinized celluloses step 1 obtained is placed in dicyandiamide solution by bath raio 1:20～1:50, temperature be 50～60 DEG C, under nitrogen protective condition, condensing reflux 10～45min；Add monomer 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate, after magnetic agitation 10～45min, add composite initiator continue stirring reaction 1～8h, cross filtered product wash through alcohol, deionized water wash, drying, obtain graft copolymer fibre element；Described composite initiator is ammonium ceric nitrate and azodiisobutyronitrile；

3, amidoxime: by hydroxylamine salt and alkaline reagent during 1:2～2:1 is dissolved in methanol solution in molar ratio, compound concentration is the hydroxylamine solution of 1mol/L, graft copolymer fibre element step 2 obtained by bath raio 1:15～1:50 joins in hydroxylamine solution, it is 65～75 DEG C in temperature, reacts 1～6h under the conditions of magnetic agitation, product is successively through methanol, deionized water wash, dry, prepare modified cellulosic materials.

In technical solution of the present invention, described cellulose is the one in native cellulose and goods, regenerated cellulose and goods thereof, rich cellulose agricultural byproducts, microcrystalline Cellulose.Described native cellulose and goods thereof are cotton fiber, flaxen fiber or bamboo fiber；Regenerated cellulose and goods thereof are viscose rayon or bamboo pulp fiber；Rich cellulose agricultural byproducts are straw or timber.

Dicyandiamide solution described in step 2 is the one in acetone, methanol, ethanol or isopropanol；Described 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate is 1:2～2:1 with the mass ratio of alkalinized celluloses；Described ammonium ceric nitrate is the 0.2%～3% of alkalinized celluloses quality；Azodiisobutyronitrile is the 0.2%～3% of 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate quality；It is the one in methanol, ethanol or isopropanol that described alcohol is washed with alcohol.

Hydroxylamine salt described in step 3 is oxammonium hydrochloride. or oxammonium sulfate.；Described alkaline reagent is the one in sodium hydroxide, sodium bicarbonate, sodium carbonate, or multiple.

It is a kind of for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution that technical solution of the present invention also includes that the method that is prepared as described above obtains.

The principle of the present invention is: with cellulose as initiation material, activates to obtain alkalinized celluloses through alkali；With alkalinized celluloses as base material, 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate is that monomer, ammonium ceric nitrate and azodiisobutyronitrile make composite initiator, is grafted on alkalinized celluloses by monomer；Use hydroxylamine solution modified to above-mentioned cellulose amidoximeization, prepare a kind of modified cellulosic materials not only contain amidoxime group but also comprise that azanol oximido is rolled into a ball, two kinds of group synergism, absorbability further enhances, and the function of cellulose and potentiality will be able to deeper utilization and excavation.

The present invention utilizes natural polymer cellulose to prepare modified cellulosic materials for base material, on the one hand, provide a kind of novel material that can be used for heavy-metal ion removal, organic pollution；On the other hand, breach prior art and practice, develop the preparation method of a kind of new modified cellulosic materials, add new member for cellulose derivative family.This modified cellulosic materials had both possessed the features such as cellulose porous, bigger serface, high mechanical properties, and the introducing of amidoxim and azanol oximido group simultaneously makes cellulolytic activity higher, is more easy to combine with target substance.

Compared with prior art, the present invention is particularly advantageous in that

1, the raw cellulose used by the present invention is natural macromolecular material, cheap and easy to get, safety and environmental protection, biodegradable.

2, preparation technology of the present invention is simple, easy controlled operation, it is simple to batch production.

3, the modified cellulosic materials coarse surface structure, the mechanical strength that prepare are high, high adsorption capacity, it is possible to for processing the waste water containing heavy metal ion, organic pollution.

Accompanying drawing explanation

The preparation flow figure of the modified cotton fiber material that Fig. 1 provides for the present invention；

The infrared spectrum comparison diagram of the rear before modified cotton fiber that Fig. 2 provides for the embodiment of the present invention 1；

Fig. 3 is the scanning electron microscope (SEM) photograph of raw cotton fiber used by the embodiment of the present invention 1；

Fig. 4 is the scanning electron microscope (SEM) photograph of the modified cotton fiber material of the embodiment of the present invention 1 preparation；

Fig. 5 is that the modified cotton fiber material of the embodiment of the present invention 1 preparation is to Cu2+、Fe3+, methylene blue and the saturated extent of adsorption rectangular histogram of Congo red.

Detailed description of the invention

In order to illustrate technical scheme and goal of the invention, the present invention will be further described with specific embodiment below in conjunction with the accompanying drawings.

Embodiment 1

See accompanying drawing 1, for the preparation flow figure of the present embodiment modified cotton fiber material.Reaction (1) is under composite initiator ammonium ceric nitrate and azodiisobutyronitrile effect, and 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate grafts to alkalize on cotton fiber；Reaction (2) is that this graft copolymer occurs amidoximeization to change under oxammonium hydrochloride. and sodium carbonate effect, cyano group is transformed into amidoxime group, ester bond is converted into azanol oximido group, therefore this product finished product is not only to contain amidoxime group but also comprise the modified cotton fiber material of azanol oximido group.Specifically comprising the following steps that of preparation method

(1) cotton fiber alkalization: weigh 5g cotton fiber, it is placed in the NaOH solution that 250mL concentration is 1wt%, 85 DEG C of kiering 120min, it is transferred in the NaOH solution that 150mL concentration is 18wt% after taking out drainage, 20 DEG C of stirring 120min, product, through filtration, deionization washing, drying, obtains alkalization cotton fiber.

(2) graft copolymerization: take 2g above-mentioned alkalization cotton fiber and be placed in the four-hole boiling flask filling 40mL acetone soln; after nitrogen protects lower 50 DEG C of condensing reflux 40min; add 2g monomer 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate magnetic agitation 10min; subsequently 0.01g ammonium ceric nitrate and 0.01g azodiisobutyronitrile are added in above-mentioned reactant liquor; continue stirring reaction 4h; wash through methanol after taking out filtration, deionization is washed, 50 DEG C of drying, obtains graft copolymerization cotton fiber.

(3) amidoxime: 4g oxammonium hydrochloride. and 6.1g sodium carbonate are dissolved in the hydroxylamine solution that methanol solution compound concentration is 1mol/L, then take in the there-necked flask that 2g graft copolymerization cotton fiber puts into the hydroxylamine solution filling above-mentioned preparation, 65 DEG C of magnetic agitation 4h, product is successively through methanol, deionized water wash for several times, 50 DEG C of drying, prepare modified cotton fiber material.

Seeing accompanying drawing 2, the infrared spectrum comparison diagram of the rear before modified cotton fiber that it provides for the present embodiment, in figure, curve a, b, c represent raw cotton fiber, graft copolymerization cotton fiber and modified cotton fiber material respectively.As seen from the figure, compared with raw cotton fiber, 2226cm in graft copolymerization cotton fiber-1And 1725cm-1Place occurs in that the stretching vibration peak of C ≡ N and C=O, the bending vibration peak 1379cm of methyl and methylene simultaneously respectively-1It is remarkably reinforced, shows that 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate is successfully grafted on cotton fiber；And absworption peak 2226cm in modified cotton fiber material-1And 1725cm-1Disappear, and be attended by new peak 1637cm-1(the association peak of ν C=N and ν C=O) and 1552cm-1(δ N-H) occurs, adds 3445cm-1(stretching vibration peak of N-H and O-H) is remarkably reinforced, it was demonstrated that modified cotton fiber material is successfully prepared.

Seeing accompanying drawing 3 and Fig. 4, they are respectively raw cotton fiber and the scanning electron microscope (SEM) photograph of modified cotton fiber that the present embodiment provides.It is apparent that raw cotton fiber has natural convolution, its vertical face is the irregular helical twist constantly changing along fibre length and turning to；And cotton fiber natural convolution after modified disappears, surface becomes coarse, has a little groove or etching to occur, and the amidoxime group of the monomer that is grafted of groove or etching or generation is filled, and demonstrates again that modified cotton fiber material is successfully prepared.

Seeing accompanying drawing 5, the modified cotton fiber material provided for the present embodiment is used for metal ion Cu2+And Fe3+, the rectangular histogram of saturated extent of adsorption of dyestuff methylene blue and Congo red, adsorption conditions is: initial concentration is 500pm, pH value is each solution initial value, temperature is 30 DEG C.As it is shown in figure 5, Cu2+、Fe3+, the saturated extent of adsorption of methylene blue and Congo red respectively reach 93mg/g, 158mg/g, 237mg/g and 479mg/g, show that this modified cellulosic materials possesses the absorbability of excellence to metal ion and dyestuff.According to the performance of modified cotton fiber material, it can be used for the heavy metal ion in adsorbed water body, organic pollution etc.；Simultaneously it can also be used to enriching and recovering noble metal and the test analysis etc. of rare metal, floatable minerals and trace metal element.

Embodiment 2

(1) viscose rayon alkalization: weigh 5g viscose rayon, it is placed in the NaOH solution that 100mL concentration is 4wt%, 90 DEG C of kiering 90min, it is transferred in the NaOH solution that 250mL concentration is 12wt% after taking out drainage, 25 DEG C of stirring 90min, product, through filtration, deionization washing, drying, obtains basified viscose.

(2) graft copolymerization: take the above-mentioned basified viscose of 2g and be placed in the four-hole boiling flask filling 60mL aqueous isopropanol; after nitrogen protects lower 55 DEG C of condensing reflux 30min; add 1g monomer 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate magnetic agitation 15min; subsequently 0.01g ammonium ceric nitrate and 0.008g azodiisobutyronitrile are added in above-mentioned reactant liquor; continue stirring reaction 2h; wash through methanol after taking out filtration, deionization is washed, 50 DEG C of drying, obtains graft copolymerization viscose rayon.

(3) amidoxime: 4g oxammonium hydrochloride. and 2.3g sodium hydroxide are dissolved in the hydroxylamine solution that methanol solution compound concentration is 1mol/L, then take in the there-necked flask that 1.5g graft copolymerization viscose rayon puts into the hydroxylamine solution filling above-mentioned preparation, 70 DEG C of magnetic agitation 3h, product is successively through methanol, deionized water wash for several times, 50 DEG C of drying, prepare modified viscose fiber material.

Embodiment 3

(1) microcrystalline Cellulose alkalization: weigh 5g microcrystalline Cellulose, it is placed in the NaOH solution that 150mL concentration is 2.5wt%, 100 DEG C of kiering 60min, it is transferred in the NaOH solution that 100mL concentration is 25wt% after taking out drainage, 30 DEG C of stirring 75min, product, through filtration, deionization washing, drying, obtains the microcrystalline Cellulose that alkalizes.

(2) graft copolymerization: take 2g above-mentioned alkalization microcrystalline Cellulose and be placed in the four-hole boiling flask filling 80mL methanol solution; after nitrogen protects lower 60 DEG C of condensing reflux 15min; add 4g monomer 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate magnetic agitation 45min; subsequently 0.05g ammonium ceric nitrate and 0.05g azodiisobutyronitrile are added in above-mentioned reactant liquor; continue stirring reaction 6h; wash through methanol after taking out filtration, deionization is washed, 50 DEG C of drying, obtains graft copolymerization microcrystalline Cellulose.

(3) amidoxime: 9.3g oxammonium sulfate. and 6.1g sodium carbonate are dissolved in the hydroxylamine solution that methanol solution compound concentration is 1mol/L, then take in the there-necked flask that 2g graft copolymerization microcrystalline Cellulose puts into the hydroxylamine solution filling above-mentioned preparation, 75 DEG C of magnetic agitation 2h, product is successively through methanol, deionized water wash for several times, 50 DEG C of drying, prepare modified microcrystalline cellulose material.

1. the preparation method of the modified cellulosic materials being used for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, organic pollution, it is characterised in that comprise the steps:
</claim-text>(1) cellulose alkalization: cellulose is placed in the NaOH solution that concentration is 0.5～5wt% by bath raio 1:10～1:100, kiering 30～150min under conditions of temperature is 80～100 DEG C, after taking out drainage, it is placed in the NaOH solution that concentration is 10～30wt% by bath raio 1:20～1:50, under conditions of temperature is 20～30 DEG C, stirring or concussion process 60～180min, then through filtration, deionized water wash, drying, obtain alkalinized celluloses；
</claim-text>(2) graft copolymerization: the alkalinized celluloses that step (1) obtains is placed in dicyandiamide solution by bath raio 1:20～1:50, temperature be 50～60 DEG C, under nitrogen protective condition, condensing reflux 10～45min；Add monomer 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate, after magnetic agitation 10～45min, add composite initiator continue stirring reaction 1～8h, cross filtered product wash through alcohol, deionized water wash, drying, obtain graft copolymer fibre element；Described composite initiator is ammonium ceric nitrate and azodiisobutyronitrile, and described ammonium ceric nitrate is the 0.2%～3% of alkalinized celluloses quality；Azodiisobutyronitrile is the 0.2%～3% of 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate quality；Described 2-cyano group-3-ethoxy ethyl acrylate is 1:2～2:1 with the mass ratio of alkalinized celluloses；
</claim-text>(3) amidoxime: by hydroxylamine salt and alkaline reagent during 1:2～2:1 is dissolved in methanol solution in molar ratio, compound concentration is the hydroxylamine solution of 1mol/L, by bath raio 1:15～1:50, the graft copolymer fibre element that step (2) obtains is joined in hydroxylamine solution, it is 65～75 DEG C in temperature, reacts 1～6h under the conditions of magnetic agitation, product is successively through methanol, deionized water wash, dry, prepare modified cellulosic materials.
</claim-text></claim-text>The most according to claim 1 for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the preparation method of the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution, it is characterized in that, described cellulose is the one in native cellulose and goods, regenerated cellulose and goods thereof, rich cellulose agricultural byproducts.
</claim-text></claim-text>The most according to claim 2 for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the preparation method of the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution, it is characterised in that described native cellulose and goods thereof are cotton fiber, flaxen fiber or bamboo fiber；Regenerated cellulose and goods thereof are viscose rayon or bamboo pulp fiber；Rich cellulose agricultural byproducts are straw or timber.
</claim-text></claim-text>The most according to claim 1 for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the preparation method of the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution, it is characterised in that the dicyandiamide solution described in step (2) is the one in acetone, methanol, ethanol or isopropanol.
</claim-text></claim-text>The most according to claim 1 for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the preparation method of the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution, it is characterised in that in step (2), alcohol is washed with alcohol is the one in methanol, ethanol or isopropanol.
</claim-text></claim-text>The most according to claim 1 for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the preparation method of the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution, it is characterised in that the hydroxylamine salt described in step (3) is oxammonium hydrochloride. or oxammonium sulfate.；Described alkaline reagent is one or more in sodium hydroxide, sodium bicarbonate, sodium carbonate.
</claim-text></claim-text>7. by claim 1 preparation method obtain a kind of for Adsorption of Heavy Metal Ions, the modified cellulosic materials of organic pollution.
</claim-text>

inventionTitles.title: A kind of containing methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the complex composition of benziothiazolinone and antibacterial

event-title.$: GRANT OF PATENT OR UTILITY MODEL

section.content: 本发明公开了种含甲磺酰菌唑和噻霉酮的复配组合物，它以甲磺酰菌唑和噻霉酮为主要活性成分，其中甲磺酰菌唑的化学名称为2‑(对氟苯基)‑5‑甲磺酰基‑1,3,4‑噁二唑；甲磺酰菌唑和噻霉酮的重量比为(100～1)：(1～40)，进步优选为(40～1):(1～10)。活性成分A和B的重量总和占该组合物总重量的0.1‑90％。本发明的复配组合物表现出明显的协同增效作用，同时减少病害的抗药性。可用于防治多种作物细菌病，如水稻细菌性条斑病、水稻白叶枯病、黄瓜细菌性角斑病、番茄青枯病、大白菜软腐病、柑橘溃疡病等细菌性病害。

The invention discloses a kind of containing methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the complex composition of benziothiazolinone, it is with methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and benziothiazolinone as main active, and wherein the chemical name of methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles is 2 (to fluorophenyl) 5 mesyl 1,3,4 diazole；The weight ratio of methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and benziothiazolinone is (100～1): (1～40), more preferably (40～1): (1～10).The weight summation of active components A and B accounts for the 0.1 90% of said composition gross weight.The complex composition of the present invention shows obvious synergistic function, reduces the Drug resistance of disease simultaneously.Can be used for preventing and treating various crop bacterial disease, such as bacterial diseases such as bacterial leaf streak of rice, bacterial blight of rice, cucumber bacterial angular leaf spot, bacterial wilt of tomato, soft rot of Chinese cabbage, citrus bacterial canker diseases.

A kind of containing methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the complex composition of benziothiazolinone and antibacterialTechnical field

The present invention relates to technical field of pesticide, particularly relate to containing methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the complex composition of benziothiazolinone and sterilization Agent.

Background technology

Along with weather, the change of pattern of farming, the generation of bacterial diseases of crops, the loss caused increases the weight of year by year, but It is that the correlational study of bacterial disease does not obtain enough attention, the Prevention Technique of bacterial disease is lagged behind fungus relatively Disease, causes bacterial disease to be increasingly becoming the Major Diseases having a strong impact on agricultural production in some areas.Secondly, at present to carefully The preferable pharmacy variety of fungal disease drug effect is few.

To this end, Guizhou University's independent research have new type bactericide " the one class preventing and control crop antibacterial of independent intellectual property rights The diazole sulfone compound (Patent No. ZL201110314246.2) of disease ", its structural formula is:

The step of preparation process of this compound and condition:

(1) preparation of different replacing acid methyl ester intermediate: with different organic acid and absolute methanol as raw material, at concentrated sulphuric acid Lower back flow reaction 6-10 hour of catalysis, reduce pressure separating methanol, and after saturated sodium bicarbonate aqueous solution adjusts ph=7, separatory obtains different first Acid methyl ester；

(2) preparation of different substituted formylhydrazine intermediate: be dissolved in methanol with different methyl formates, the most slowly add 40%-80% hydrazine hydrate, till back flow reaction is complete, separates out different substituted formylhydrazine after cooling；

(3) 2-sulfydryl-5-replaces the preparation of-1,3,4-diazole intermediate: with the formylhydrazine of above-mentioned preparation and KOH, two Nitric sulfid is raw material, and ethanol is solvent, and back flow reaction is complete, de-ethanol, adjusts PH=5 to obtain 2-sulfydryl-5-and replaces-1,3,4- Diazole；

(4) 2-thioether-5-replaces the preparation of-1,3,4-diazole intermediate: replace-1,3,4-with above-mentioned 2-sulfydryl-5- Diazole is raw material, after hydro-oxidation sodium water dissolution, is reacted by dimethyl sulfate (second) ester or the halogenated hydrocarbons etc. of mole with 1-2 To corresponding sulfide compound；

(5) 2-methyl (ethyl) sulfonyl-5-replaces the preparation of-1,3,4-diazole.

With corresponding thioether as raw material, it is dissolved in glacial acetic acid, 2%-7% potassium permanganate solution or 30% hydrogen peroxide Oxidation obtains corresponding sulfone compound.

Summary of the invention

For diazole sulfone compound, applicant researches and develops further, as Rn fluorine in halogen atom, R2Select C1-C5 The methyl of alkyl i.e. obtains the structural formula of diazole sulfone compound:

Its chemical name is 2-(to fluorophenyl)-5-mesyl-1,3,4-diazole, is called for short methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles.

The concrete syntheti c route of compound methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles is as follows:

(1) synthesis to fluorobenzoyl hydrazine

(2) the 2-sulfydryl-5-synthesis to fluorophenyl-1,3,4-diazole

(3) the 2-Dimethyl sulfide-5-synthesis to fluorophenyl-1,3,4-diazole

(4) 2-(to fluorophenyl)-5-mesyl-1,3,4-diazole target compound is prepared

Applicant further study show that, methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles is a kind of novel bacterial disease pesticide control, can ooze Enter plant epidermis, after Uptake and translocation, act on target leaf, synthesized by the energy of suppression antibacterial, finally suppress antibacterial Growth and breeding.Show that bacterial blight of rice, cucumber bacterial angular leaf spot, Citrus are burst by methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles through great many of experiments The series disease such as infections disease, bacterial wilt of peanut, soft rot of cabbage has good control effect.This medicament production technology is simple, right Environmental friendliness, discharge without three industrial wastes, production cost is relatively low, meets the environmental protection theory that modern agricultural production is advocated. And sterilize and general extensively various bacterial disease had good control effect, there is high-efficiency low-toxicity, wide spectrum, the feature of safety, It is a kind of to there is exploitation for the novel green pesticide of large tonnage product potential quality.

Benziothiazolinone is a kind of novel, wide-spectrum bactericide, is mainly used in preventing and treating and treatment cucumber downy mildew, pear scab, Herba Marsileae Quadrifoliae The really various bacteria of shot hole, citrus anthracnose, grapevine anthracnose etc., fungal disease.Its bactericidal action mechanism, mainly includes Destroy pathogenic bacteria nuclear structures so that it is lose core position and exhaustion is dead and the metabolism of interference pathogenic bacteria cell so that it is raw Reason disorder, ultimately results in dead two aspects.

Through our substantial amounts of experiment, show that methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles can effectively prevent and delay soft rot, Peptic Ulcers, green grass or young crops The generation of the diseases such as rot and extension.Methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles is mixed with benziothiazolinone, on the one hand methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles suppression antibacterial, and induction is planted Strain disease resistance, on the other hand, benziothiazolinone is the most also a kind of broad-spectrum germicide, not only can significantly improve methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles Preventive effect, moreover it is possible to expand the preventing and treating spectrum of complex composition, guarantee yield to greatest extent.

In view of this, for drawbacks described above, it is an object of the invention to: a kind of answering containing methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and benziothiazolinone is provided Combo compound and antibacterial thereof, show obvious synergistic function at preventing and treating bacterial disease.

In order to reach the mesh of invention, the technical solution used in the present invention is:

A kind of containing methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the complex composition of benziothiazolinone, described complex composition is with methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and thiophene Mould ketone is active component, and wherein the chemical name of methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles is 2-(to fluorophenyl)-5-mesyl-1,3,4-bis- Azoles；The weight ratio of methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and benziothiazolinone is (100～1): (1～40).

Above-described containing methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the complex composition of benziothiazolinone, described methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the weight of benziothiazolinone Amount ratio is preferably (40～1): (1～10).

Above-described containing methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the complex composition of benziothiazolinone, described methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the weight of benziothiazolinone Amount ratio is preferably (20～1): (1～5).

The present invention also provides for a kind of containing methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the preparation of benziothiazolinone, contains 0.1～more than 90% by weight Arbitrary described complex composition, remaining is acceptable auxiliary agent and carrier on pesticide, is then prepared as preventing and treating crop pest Antibacterial.

Above-described containing methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the preparation of benziothiazolinone, described antibacterial contains 1～80% by weight Complex composition described in any of the above.

Above-described containing methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and the preparation of benziothiazolinone, described antibacterial is configured to water dispersible granules, wettable Property powder, microemulsion, suspending agent, aqueous emulsion, cream, suspension seed-coating agent.

Auxiliary agent of the present invention can include surfactant, defoamer, thickening agent, disintegrating agent and antifreezing agent as required In one or more, it is also possible to include other auxiliary agents that the industry is conventional as required.

Surfactant used preferably is selected from polyoxyethylene sorbitan fatty acid ester series, fatty alcohol-polyoxyethylene ether system Row, condensation compound of alkyl phenol and epoxy ethane OP series, NPE series, styrylphenol formaldehyde resin polyoxy Ethylene-oxypropylene block type polyether series, triphen ethyl phenol polyoxyethylene ether series, double phenethyl phenol polyethenoxy ether system Row, in calcium dodecyl benzene sulfonate (i.e. 500#) one or more.

Wetting dispersing agent preferably is selected from sodium lauryl sulphate, diisobutyl LOMAR PWA EINECS 246-676-2 (abbreviation pulls open powder), the di-2-ethylhexylphosphine oxide bitter edible plant Sodium sulfonate (be called for short NNO), acrylic acid and propionic acid amide. copolymer, dispersing agent MF (being called for short MF), sodium polyacrylate, Desaccharide the sodium lignin sulfonate of classification, desaccharide, the sodium lignin sulfonate of condensation and modification, lignosulfonates, polycarboxylic acids derive In thing sodium lignin sulfonate one or more.

Any one or two kinds that thickening agent preferably is selected from xanthan gum, aluminium-magnesium silicate.

Disintegrating agent includes potassium phosphate, potassium carbonate, potassium sulfate, sodium chloride, sodium sulfate, sodium phosphate, ammonium sulfate.

Antifreezing agent includes isopropanol, propylene glycol, glycerol, ethylene glycol, carbamide.

Film former includes animal glue, pectin, Polyethylene Glycol.

Binding agent includes ethyl cellulose, starch, polyvinyl alcohol.

Carrier of the present invention can be solid or liquid, and the carrier being generally used for compositions formulated antibacterial all can make With.

Described solid carrier preferably is selected from white carbon, Kaolin, water, potter's clay, bentonite, kieselguhr, earth powder, lightweight carbonic acid One or more in calcium

During described bactericidal composition preparation liquid dosage form, the liquid-carrier used includes water and organic solvent, You Jirong Agent is toluene, dimethylbenzene, methyl oleate, solvent naphtha, Oleum Terebinthinae, vegetable oil, dichloromethane, chloroform, methanol, ethanol, different Propanol, butanol, isoamyl alcohol, Ketohexamethylene, isophorone, 1-Phenylethanone., ethyl acetate, butyl acetate, N-Methyl pyrrolidone, diformazan Base sulfoxide, methyl cellosolve, ethyl cellosolve, solvent naphtha 200#, solvent naphtha 150#, methyl naphthalene can be used alone, it is possible to two kinds Or use mixed above.

As preferably, organic solvent of the present invention is ethanol, solvent naphtha 200#, solvent naphtha 150#, methyl naphthalene, N methyl In ketopyrrolidine one or more.

Complex composition of the present invention can be configured to wettable powder, water-dispersible according to method generally in the art Granule, microemulsion, aqueous emulsion, suspending agent, seed coat agent, cream.

Complex composition of the present invention is applicable to prevent and treat crop bacterial disease and some fungi sexually transmitted disease (STD) evil, such as Chinese cabbage Soft rot, watermelon blight, cucumber bacterial angular leaf spot and downy mildew, tobacco bacterial wilt, citrus bacterial canker disease and shot hole, Oryza sativa L. Slice is sick and bacterial leaf-blight sick, Fructus Lycopersici esculenti shot hole and Peptic Ulcers, downy mildew of garpe, the antibacterial such as bacterial wilt of melon and solanaceous vegetable Fungal disease.

The compositions of the present invention can be used by commonsense method, processes as added water spray stem and leaf, it is also possible to root is executed, and also may be used Use with seed dressing or seed pelleting.It is mainly used in the crops such as Oryza sativa L., Nicotiana tabacum L., Fructus Cucumidis sativi, Fructus Lycopersici esculenti, Citrus, prevents and control antibacterial Sexually transmitted disease (STD) evil, it is ensured that yield.

Complex composition of the present invention has the advantages that compared to existing technology

1, methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and benziothiazolinone compound, and prevent and treat its co-toxicity coefficient of crop pest and be more than in the range of certain proportion 120, show obvious synergistic function.

2. reduce the usage amount of pesticide,

Guarantee yield the most to greatest extent: methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles is all broad-spectrum germicide with benziothiazolinone simultaneously, effective object Predominantly plant pathogenetic bacteria, has bigger difference in the mechanism of action, can play complementary potentiation, increase each other effect The effect effectiveness of target, such that it is able to guarantee crop yield to the full extent.

Detailed description of the invention

Present invention the following example illustrates, but does not limits the scope of the invention.Methylsulfonyl used in the present invention The former medicine of bacterium azoles is provided by Guizhou University, and other former medicines used and preparation are commercial.Wherein active component (A) is methylsulfonyl bacterium Azoles (is called for short methylsulfonyl) in below table；Active component (B) is benziothiazolinone.

In preparation embodiment, wetting dispersing agent used includes diisobutyl sodium naphthalene sulfonate (abbreviation pulls open powder), the di-2-ethylhexylphosphine oxide bitter edible plant Sodium sulfonate (be called for short NNO), acrylic acid and propionic acid amide. copolymer (being called for short DA), dispersing agent MF (being called for short MF), poly- The sodium lignin sulfonate (being called for short M-9) of sodium acrylate (being called for short DC), desaccharide classification, the sodium lignin sulfonate of desaccharide condensation and modification (being called for short M-10), lignosulfonates (being called for short M-11), poly carboxylic acid derivative's (being called for short CF), sodium lignin sulfonate (are called for short M- 14)。

Surfactant selected from polyoxyethylene sorbitan fatty acid ester series include T-20, T-40, T-60, T-80, T-85, fatty alcohol-polyoxyethylene ether series includes that AEO-9, AEO-15, AEO-20, OS-15, JFC, alkyl phenol contract with oxirane Compound series includes that OP-10, OP-15, OP-18, OP-20, NPE series include NP-10, NP-15, NP- 18, NP-20, styrylphenol formaldehyde resin PULLRONIC F68 block type polyether series include 33#, 34#, 36#, 37#, triphen ethyl phenol polyoxyethylene ether series includes that 601#, 602#, 603#, double phenethyl phenol polyethenoxy ether series include 604#, 605#, 606#, anion surfactant calcium dodecyl benzene sulfonate (500#).

For the sake of unification, preparation embodiment set forth below, dispersant and emulsifying agent all use abbreviation or commercial disignation.

Embodiment prepared by preparation:

One, the preparation of water dispersible granules

By methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles, benziothiazolinone, wetting dispersing agent, binding agent, white carbon, disintegrating agent, carrier mix homogeneously, through gas After stream pulverizer is pulverized, stirring 30min, mediate with water, rear addition carries out pelletize, is dried, obtains in fluidized-bed granulation dryer The water dispersible granules of antibacterial of the present invention.

Two, the preparation of microemulsion

Methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and benziothiazolinone are added in organic solvent, after stirring, obtains transparent mixed liquor；To above-mentioned Adding surfactant in mixed liquor, stirring to emulsifying agent is completely dissolved；Under the mixing speed of 50r/min, add water to In the above-mentioned mixed liquor being dissolved with surfactant, at ambient temperature, stir 30min, obtain the microemulsion of homogeneous transparent；Upwards State addition antifreezing agent in microemulsion, stir, obtain the microemulsion of antibacterial of the present invention.Formula forms:

Three, the preparation of suspending agent

By surfactant, antifreezing agent, thickening agent, moisture content mixing, through high speed shear mix homogeneously, it is sequentially added into methylsulfonyl Bacterium azoles, benziothiazolinone, abrading-ball 2～3 hours in ball crusher, prepare antibacterial of the present invention suspending agent.

Four, the preparation of aqueous emulsion

By methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles, benziothiazolinone, surfactant, organic solvent mixing, it is dissolved into uniform oil phase；By part Water, antifreezing agent mix uniformly aqueous phase；Oil phase adds while high-speed stirred aqueous phase in a kettle., and unlatching is cut The machine of cutting carries out high speed shear, and adds remaining water and supply, and shears about half an hour, forms aqueous emulsion.I.e. prepare of the present invention The aqueous emulsion of antibacterial.

Five, the preparation of wettable powder

By methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles, benziothiazolinone, wetting dispersing agent, white carbon, carrier mix homogeneously, pulverize through jet mill After, stir 30min, obtain the wettable powder of antibacterial of the present invention.

Comparative examples is 20% methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles wettable powder.

Six, the preparation of cream

Methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and benziothiazolinone are added in organic solvent, add obtain after surfactant stirs transparent Mixed liquor, i.e. prepare the cream of antibacterial of the present invention

Seven, suspension seed-coating agent

By methylsulfonyl bacterium azoles and benziothiazolinone through comminution by gas stream, add surfactant, film former, thickening agent, antifreezing agent with Water is thoroughly mixed rear, puts into sand mill in proportion and grinds 2 times, until it is 2-3 μm that the fineness of the particles of suspension reaches D50, and D90 ＜ 8 μm, obtains the suspension seed-coating agent of antibacterial of the present invention.

The present composition is in addition to can being made into above dosage form, it is also possible to make micro-capsule suspension, injection drying agent, super-low capacity The multiple dosage forms such as amount.

Toxicity Determination

The test of following indoor biometrics uses the abundant method of Sun Yun to calculate co-toxicity coefficient (CTC) and evaluates mixed effect.

Toxicity index TI (B)=(EC of standard agent A50The EC of ÷ B agent50)×100

Actual toxicity index ATI (AB)=(EC of A50The EC of ÷ AB50)×100

Theoretical toxicity index TTI (AB)=TI (A) × A percent+TI (B) × B percentage in mixture in mixture Number

Actual measurement toxicity index (ATI)=(standard agent EC50÷ reagent agent EC50)×100

Percentage composition+B medicament the toxicity index of A in theoretical toxicity index (TTI)=A medicament toxicity index × mixture × mixed The percentage composition of B in agent

Co-toxicity coefficient (CTC)=[mixture actual measurement toxicity index (ATI) ÷ mixture theory toxicity index (TTI)] × 100 are commented Price card standard is: co-toxicity coefficient >=120 show as potentiation；Co-toxicity coefficient≤80 show as antagonism；80 < co-toxicity coefficient < 120 show as summation action.

section.content: 本发明公开了种提高液化天然气及轻烃回收装置及回收方法，原料气进管与冷箱连通，冷箱与甲烷洗涤塔的塔底通过管三连通；甲烷洗涤塔与液烃分流器通过管连通，液烃分流器通过管五与脱乙烷塔连通，液烃分流器通过管四与冷箱连通，脱乙烷塔通过管八与冷箱连通；脱乙烷塔通过管七与低温分流器连通，低温分流器与气液分离器通过管连通；气液分离器的底部与冷箱通过管连通，气液分离器与冷箱通过管十连通，冷箱与甲烷洗涤塔通过管十连通；制冷系统通过两条管与冷箱连通，制冷系统、两条管、冷箱构成制冷循环系统。本发明能在生产液化天然气LNG的同时，更高收率回收C烃，其中丙烷的收率大于98.8％，C‑烃的收率大于99.99％，实现更大经济效益。

The invention discloses a kind of raising liquefied natural gas and light ends unit and recovery method, unstripped gas inlet pipe connects with ice chest, by pipe tee joint at the bottom of the tower of ice chest and methane wash column；Methane wash column is connected by pipe with liquid hydrocarbon current divider, and liquid hydrocarbon current divider is connected by Guan Wuyu dethanizer, and liquid hydrocarbon current divider is connected by Guan Siyu ice chest, and dethanizer is connected by Guan Bayu ice chest；Dethanizer is connected by Guan Qiyu low temperature current divider, and low temperature current divider is connected by pipe with gas-liquid separator；The bottom of gas-liquid separator is connected by pipe one with ice chest, and gas-liquid separator is connected by pipe ten with ice chest, and ice chest is connected by Guan Shiyi with methane wash column；Refrigeration system is connected with ice chest by two pipes, and refrigeration system, two pipes, ice chests constitute cooling cycle system.The present invention can be while producing liquefied natural gas LNG, and higher yield reclaims C3+Hydrocarbon, wherein the yield of propane is more than 98.8%, C4+The yield of hydrocarbon is more than 99.99%, it is achieved bigger economic benefit.

One improves liquefied natural gas and light ends unit and recovery methodTechnical field

The present invention relates to natural gas liquefaction and lighter hydrocarbons recovery technical field, particularly relate to a kind of raising liquefaction sky Right gas and light ends unit and recovery method.

Background technology

With the high speed development of energy industry, use clean energy resource is also increasingly paid attention to by people, energy-conservation, ring Protect, efficiently become a big theme of current energy circle.China started a kind of from external import successively from 2005 High heating value, the novel energy LNG of environmental protection.LNG receiving station is completed at home successively in recent years, indicates me The epoch of state LNG industry high speed development formally arrive.From LNG import volume in 2005 483 tons to 2013 Break through 17,000,000 tons.The behind of LNG industry high speed development there is also a lot of problem.By LNG is accepted Investigation of standing finds, China's LNG loss of enterprise is serious.Analysis through system have found following principal element:

First, the LNG of China's import mainly have two kinds, lean gas and rich gas.The large percentage that rich gas accounts for.Logical Cross C in experiment discovery rich gas2+Content be up to about 10%.This part of fuel is directly gone out with natural gas by enterprise Selling, this directly results in the loss of fund to a certain extent.

Second, the LNG of China's import is mainly derived from Australia, and its commercial value is according to LNG calorific value Calculate, and China's sale natural gas is by cubic meter.By conversion discovery China's commercial value and import price Lattice gap between the two is very little.Such as in March, 2013, China LNG import average price is 552 beautiful yuan/ton, It is roughly equal to 2.44 yuan/cubic metre.Wherein the LNG average price from Qatar is 932 beautiful yuan/ton, is roughly equal to 4.11 Unit/cube, it is far above average national level；The same period, the LNG spot price from Yemen was more up to 1026 Beautiful yuan/ton, being roughly equal to 4.53 dollars/cubic metre becomes China's imported L NG price stock resource the highest, And need to sell according to Gas Prices after national regulation LNG gasification, deduct annual cost and operating charges causes Make a large amount of LNG enterprise of China heavy losses.

, the 3rd, during LNG gasification, will produce the cryogenic energy of about 830kJ/kg.This part cold energy is at me The Ge great LNG receiving station of state generally by natural gas vaporizer by air or Absorption by Sea Water, fail to be had The utilization of effect, causes the huge waste of energy.Development abroad LNG is relatively domestic relatively early, nineteen sixty the U.S. Take to the research of this project and propose LNG lighter hydrocarbons separation patent flow process successively and come into operation, as US3837172、US5114451、US5588308、US6604380B1US6907752B2、US6941771B2、 US6986266B2, US7069743B2 etc..

Domestic current theoretical research is in the commercial Application that the starting stage there is no LNG lighter hydrocarbons separating technology.As clearly The research that CNOOC has carried out cold energy use project is closed by Hua Da student's federation, and Tongji University has carried out cold energy use principle And the exploration of method, South China Science & Engineering University has carried out the research in terms of cold energy optimizes integrated utilization, Shanghai maritime affairs University carried out the cold-storage of LNG cold energy and cascade utilization in terms of research.Also do on the basis of these are studied Go out and be correspondingly improved flow process, had an advantage in that and decrease the utilization to compressor, reduced the waste of energy consumption, Add the cascade utilization to cold energy, reduce the loss of cold energy.But there is following humiliation in this type of flow process great majority Sick as too high in structure complexity, equipment cost and product design is not up to standard.With domestic natural gas source of the gas Enrich constantly, moisture (C in unstripped gas in liquefying plant3+) ratio has a large range of fluctuation, and wherein C3+ Being important industrial chemicals, the chemical products of high added value can be produced, if being isolated recovery, having aobvious The society writing and economic benefit.At present, domestic had a lot of special recovery lighter hydrocarbons from natural gas line gas Retracting device and method, the lighter hydrocarbons in pipe natural gas are only separated and recovered by these apparatus and method, Isolated methane, ethane contain the more propane of quantity, C4+The materials such as-hydrocarbon, propane, C4+The materials such as-hydrocarbon Added value content higher, so liquefy after natural gas in methane, ethane accounting content relatively low, no Highly purified LNG can be obtained, and will have propane, the C of important added value4+The materials such as-hydrocarbon are liquefied as LNG.

Content of the invention

The weak point existing for prior art, it is an object of the invention to provide a kind of raising liquefaction natural Gas and light ends unit and recovery method, can obtain highly purified methane, ethane liquefaction from unstripped gas The recovery C of natural gas, beneficially higher yield3+Hydrocarbon, wherein the yield of propane is more than 98.8%, C4+The receipts of-hydrocarbon Rate is more than 99.99%.

The purpose of the present invention is achieved through the following technical solutions:

A kind of raising liquefied natural gas and light ends unit, including unstripped gas inlet pipe, ice chest, methane wash Tower, liquid hydrocarbon current divider, dethanizer, reboiler, low temperature current divider, cryogenic pump, gas-liquid separator, system Cooling system and liquefied natural gas go out pipe, and described unstripped gas inlet pipe connects with ice chest, ice chest and methane wash column By pipe tee joint at the bottom of tower；The bottom of described methane wash column is connected by pipe with liquid hydrocarbon current divider, and liquid hydrocarbon divides The first half connection by Guan Wuyu dethanizer for the stream device, liquid hydrocarbon current divider is connected by Guan Siyu ice chest, de- The first half of ethane tower is by ice chest connection described in Guan Bayu；The first half of described dethanizer passes through Guan Qiyu Low temperature current divider connects, and low temperature current divider is connected by pipe with gas-liquid separator；The end of described gas-liquid separator Portion is connected by pipe one with ice chest, and the top of gas-liquid separator is connected by pipe ten with ice chest, ice chest and methane The top of scrubbing tower is connected by Guan Shiyi；Described refrigeration system is connected with ice chest by two pipes, refrigeration system System, two pipes, ice chests constitute cooling cycle system.

In order to the present invention is better achieved, the present invention also provides the second preferred embodiment, and the second is limited Be to increase following technical characteristic in place of the difference of embodiment and technique scheme: described low temperature current divider with The first half of methane wash column connects also by pipe nine.

In order to improve propane, C4+The rate of recovery of-hydrocarbon, described Deethanizer bottom is provided with reboiler by pipe connection.

Currently preferred ice chest structure and as follows with the annexation of other parts: described ice chest includes The first condenser pipe of being arranged in order, the second condenser pipe, the 3rd condenser pipe, the 4th condenser pipe, the 5th condenser pipe, 6th condenser pipe, the 7th condenser pipe；One end mouth of pipe of described first condenser pipe connects with unstripped gas inlet pipe, separately One end mouth of pipe and pipe tee joint；One end mouth of pipe of described second condenser pipe connects with Guan Shiyi, the other end mouth of pipe Go out pipe with liquefied natural gas to connect；One end mouth of pipe of described 3rd condenser pipe and pipe eight connectivity, the other end mouth of pipe Connect with pipe one；Described 4th condenser pipe, the 6th condenser pipe are connected by pipe with refrigeration system respectively；Described Also be communicated with pipe two between ice chest and the first half of methane wash column, one end mouth of pipe of described 5th condenser pipe with Pipe ten connects, and the other end mouth of pipe connects with pipe two；Also connect between the first half of described dethanizer and ice chest Having pipe six, one end mouth of pipe of described 7th condenser pipe connects with pipe six, and the other end mouth of pipe connects with pipe four.

Further technical scheme is: connects on the pipe between methane wash column with liquid hydrocarbon current divider and is provided with liquid Hydrocarbon force (forcing) pump.

Technical scheme still further preferably is: described low temperature current divider also connects with on the pipe of gas-liquid separator It is provided with cryogenic pump.

A kind of raising liquefied natural gas and methods of light hydrocarbon recovery, comprise the steps of

A, unstripped gas are passed through ice chest and carry out cooling process, obtain temperature value for-44～-40 DEG C, force value be 2.7～3.1MPa, molar flow are the unstripped gas of 910～950kgmole/h；

B, unstripped gas washing: being passed into the unstripped gas of step a in scrubbing tower and washing, cleaning solution is gas Liquid phase after liquid/gas separator separates mixes hydrocarbon, its temperature value is 38～42 DEG C, force value is 2.7～3.1MPa, Molar flow is 120～150kgmole/h；

c、C3+The recovery of hydrocarbon: the liquid after the washing of step b is passed in liquid hydrocarbon current divider through liquid hydrocarbon force (forcing) pump, Through liquid hydrocarbon current divider shunting after obtain temperature value for-48～-44 DEG C, force value be 3.0～3.4MPa, mole Flow is the first liquid of 200～240kgmole/h, is passed into first liquid in dethanizer and washs De-C3+Hydrocarbon process, reclaims C3+Hydrocarbons, its cleaning solution be temperature value be-51～-47 DEG C, force value be 3.0～ 3.4MPa, molar flow are the liquid of 110～150kgmole/h；

D, step c tower top after dethanizer washing obtain temperature value be-19～-15 DEG C, force value be 2.8～ 3.2MPa, molar flow are predominantly methane, the ethane mixed gas of 330～370kgmole/h, also include A small amount of C3+Hydrocarbons, this methane, ethane mixed gas obtain after ice chest temperature value for-52～-48 DEG C, Force value be 2.7～3.1MPa, molar flow be that the predominantly methane of 330～370kgmole/h, ethane mix Closing liquid, this is mainly methane, ethane mixing liquid sequentially passes through gas-liquid separator, cryogenic pump, low temperature divide Constituting the wash liquid described in step b in the scrubbing tower of stream device rear portion entrance step b, another part enters Enter the cleaning solution constituting in dethanizer described in step c；

In e, step c through liquid hydrocarbon current divider shunting after obtain temperature value for-48～-44 DEG C, force value be 3.0～3.4MPa, molar flow are the second liquid of 130～170kgmole/h, and second liquid is through ice chest Obtain temperature value be 28～32 DEG C, force value be 3.0～3.4MPa, molar flow be 130～170kgmole/h Cleaning solution, this cleaning solution enters in dethanizer and carries out washing de-C3+Hydrocarbon process；

F, the acquirement of liquefied natural gas: step b washing after obtain temperature value for-64～-60 DEG C, force value be 2.7～3.1MPa, molar flow are the methane-rich gas of 760～800kgmole/h, with dethanizer top gas After ice chest is cooled to-62～-58 DEG C, the gas phase of gas-liquid separation obtains after gas phase blender, ice chest again Temperature value is-157～-153 DEG C, force value be 0.04～0.06MPa, molar flow be 760～ The liquefied natural gas product of 800kgmole/h；

G, the acquirement of lighter hydrocarbons: the liquid phase at the bottom of step d dethanizer is mainly lighter hydrocarbons, temperature after reboiler heating The liquid phase that angle value is 95～100 DEG C, force value is 2.7～3.1MPa mixes hydrocarbon.

The present invention also provides the second preferred recovery method, the limited embodiment of the second and above-mentioned technical side Being to increase following technical matters method in place of case difference, the cleaning solution in described step b also includes by step d The temperature value obtaining after gas-liquid separator separates is-51～-47 DEG C, force value is 3.0～3.4MPa's Liquid phase mixes hydrocarbon.

The present invention compared with the prior art, has the following advantages and beneficial effect:

The present invention can obtain highly purified methane, ethane liquefied natural gas, its methane, second from unstripped gas The purity of alkane can reach more than 99% so that the C containing in methane, ethane liquefied natural gas3+Hydrocarbon content pole Few, the beneficially recovery C of higher yield3+Hydrocarbon.Being proved by test of many times, the yield of propane of the present invention is more than 98.8%, C4+The yield of-hydrocarbon is more than 99.99%.Further, for the cleaning solution of unstripped gas washing in methane wash column Having two kinds, two kinds of cleaning solutions are circulated by this retracting device and recovery process and obtain, and improve C3+The yield of hydrocarbon.

section.content: 本发明公开了种三硝基间苯三酚的绿色合成方法及应用，属于有机合成技术领域。本发明所提供的方法为将亚硝酸酯滴加至间苯三酚醇溶液中进行亚硝化反应，然后蒸除醇溶剂，加入氢氧化钠溶液溶解，再滴加过氧化氢溶液进行氧化反应，调节pH后利用有机溶剂萃取，洗涤浓缩后获得三硝基间苯三酚。本发明污染小、腐蚀性小，反应条件温和，无需催化剂，克服了传统合成方法中污染严重、腐蚀设备、条件剧烈等缺点。适用于合成三硝基间苯三酚。

The invention discloses green synthesis method and the application of a kind of trinitrophloroglucinol, belong to technical field of organic synthesis.Method provided by the present invention for dropping to carry out in phloroglucinol alcoholic solution nitrosation reaction by nitrites, then alcoholic solvent is evaporated off, add sodium hydroxide solution to dissolve, drip hydrogenperoxide steam generator again and carry out oxidation reaction, utilize organic solvent to extract after regulation pH, after washing concentrating, obtain trinitrophloroglucinol.The present invention pollute little, corrosivity is little, reaction condition is gentle, it is not necessary to catalyst, overcomes seriously polluted in prior synthesizing method, etching apparatus, the condition shortcoming such as acutely.It is applicable to synthesize trinitrophloroglucinol.

The green synthesis method of a kind of trinitrophloroglucinol and applicationTechnical field

The present invention relates to green synthesis method and the application of a kind of trinitrophloroglucinol, belong to organic synthesis technology neck Territory.

Background technology

Trinitrophloroglucinol (TNPG) is that one has highly acid aromatic series phenolic compound (formula 1), can be with many Planting metal and form the slaine with intense explosion performance, wherein Lead trinitrophloroglucinate is exactly a kind of important priming, separately Outward, it is also that synthesis insensitiveness, high explosive 1,3,5-triamido-2,4,6-trinitrobenzenes (TATB) and New Explosives diaminourea are bitter The important intermediate of sour in the mouth ammonium (ADAP).

Trinitrophloroglucinol has multiple synthetic method, at present, with phloroglucinol nitrification synthesis trinitrophloroglucinol Route is the most ripe.Due to the strong passivation effect of nitro, the nitro first reacted during nitrification can be substantially reduced the reactivity of phenyl ring, Follow-up di-nitrated and three nitrifications are made to need nitration condition strongly just can carry out.Therefore, traditional handicraft is to use dense sulfur Acid carries out nitrification production as nitrating agent to phloroglucinol with the mixed acid system of concentrated nitric acid, nitrate or nitric anhydride, has reacted Cheng Hou, through dilution, filtration, pickling, is dried to obtain finished product (DeFusco, A.A.et al.Organic Preparations and Procedures International,1982,14(6),393-5；Ma,Xiaoming et al.Huozhayao Xuebao, 2009,32(6),24-27；Straessler,Nicholas A.Synthetic Communications,2010,40(17), 2513-2519；Srinivas,D.et al.New Journal of Chemistry,2014,38(8),3699-3707； Cantillo,D.et al.Organic Process Research&Development,2014,18(11),1360-1366； GB2355715；US7737308).Owing to needs use large excess of strong acid, production process can produce a large amount of spent acid, to equipment Corrosivity strong, pollute very serious (formula 2).United States Patent (USP) US8030521 discloses a kind of improved method, first by phloroglucinol Be dissolved in the water with sodium hydroxide, sodium nitrite, then under the conditions of 50 DEG C with excess concentrated nitric acid nitrification, cooled, filter, acid Wash, be dried after obtain finished product.Reaction needs to use large excess of concentrated nitric acid, and use and the higher temperature of a large amount of strong acid make Obtain environmental pollution and the corrosion to equipment does not reduce.

Along with more and more higher to the requirement of environmental protection both at home and abroad, research environmental protection, do not use that strong acid, corrosivity is little, condition Gentle green three nitration method becomes problem demanding prompt solution in trinitrophloroglucinol synthesis.At present, including phloroglucinol Little in the green three nitrification researchs of interior phenolic compound, Chinese patent (CN101898968B) discloses one and with nitrate is Nitrating agent, ionic liquid are the method for the green three nitrification synthesis trinitrophloroglucinols of phloroglucinol of solvent, but yield is the lowest, Product needs column chromatography for separation, operation complexity, and lyate ion volume is big, with high costs, industrialization difficulty.

Summary of the invention

For solving the deficiencies in the prior art, the invention provides a kind of insensitive energetic material precursor trinitrophloroglucinol Green synthesis method, to overcome seriously polluted, the problem such as corrosivity is strong, condition is violent present in existing synthetic method, uses Technical scheme as follows:

It is an object of the invention to provide the green synthesis method of a kind of trinitrophloroglucinol, the method is by nitrous acid Ester drops to carry out in phloroglucinol alcoholic solution nitrosation reaction, and alcoholic solvent is then evaporated off, and adds sodium hydroxide solution and dissolves, then Dropping hydrogenperoxide steam generator carries out oxidation reaction, utilizes organic solvent to extract, obtain between trinitro-after washing concentrating after regulation pH Benzenetriol.

Described method, step is:

1) phloroglucinol is dissolved in alcoholic solvent, it is thus achieved that the alcoholic solution of phloroglucinol；

2) under condition of ice bath, nitrites is slowly added dropwise to step 1) gained solution carries out nitrosation reaction, so After be evaporated alcoholic solvent, add sodium hydroxide solution dissolve, it is thus achieved that Nitrosation Products solution；

3) at ambient temperature, hydrogenperoxide steam generator is dropped to step 2) gained solution carries out oxidation reaction；

4) under condition of ice bath, regulate pH value, utilize organic solvent to extract, evaporated under reduced pressure after washing, it is thus achieved that between trinitro- Benzenetriol.

Preferably, step 1) described alcoholic solvent, for methanol or ethanol.

Preferably, step 2) described nitrites, for n-propyl nitrite, isobutyl nitrite or amyl nitrite； Addition is: every 50mmoL phloroglucinol adds 150～200mmoL nitrites.

It is highly preferred that step 2) described nitrites, addition is: every 50mmoL phloroglucinol adds 160～200mmoL Nitrites.

Optimally, step 2) described nitrites, addition is: every 50mmoL phloroglucinol adds 200mmoL nitrous acid Ester.

Preferably, step 3) described hydrogenperoxide steam generator, addition is: every 50mmoL phloroglucinol add 150～ 30% hydrogenperoxide steam generator of 450mmoL.

It is highly preferred that step 3) described hydrogenperoxide steam generator, addition is: every 50mmoL phloroglucinol add 300～ 30% hydrogenperoxide steam generator of 450mmoL.

Optimally, step 3) described hydrogenperoxide steam generator, addition is: every 50mmoL phloroglucinol adds 300mmoL 30% hydrogenperoxide steam generator.

Preferably, step 4) described pH value is 1～2；Described organic solvent, for ethyl acetate.

Described method concretely comprises the following steps:

1) 50mmoL phloroglucinol is dissolved in ethanol, it is thus achieved that the ethanol solution of phloroglucinol；

2) under condition of ice bath, 200mmoL nitrites being slowly added dropwise to step 1) in gained solution, ice bath stirs 0.5h, is warmed to room temperature stirring 0.5h, is then evaporated ethanol, adds sodium hydroxide solution, obtains nitrosation and produce after stirring and dissolving Thing solution；

3) at ambient temperature, 30% hydrogenperoxide steam generator of 300mmoL is dropped to step 2) in gained solution, room temperature Stirring 8h；

4) under condition of ice bath, after regulation pH value to 1～2, profit is extracted with ethyl acetate, evaporated under reduced pressure after washing, it is thus achieved that three Nitro phloroglucinol.

The method of the invention, contains energy at synthesis trinitrophloroglucinol and the insensitiveness with trinitrophloroglucinol as precursor Application in material.

The present invention is with phloroglucinol as raw material, and nitrites is nitrating agent, and hydrogenperoxide steam generator is oxidant, passes through nitrous Acid esters nitrosation and hydrogenperoxide steam generator oxidation two-step reaction synthesis trinitrophloroglucinol.

The reaction equation of synthetic method of the present invention is:

The method have the benefit that

1. the invention provides the green synthesis method of a kind of trinitrophloroglucinol, be a kind of novel green three nitrification Method, with phloroglucinol as raw material, nitrites is nitrating agent, and hydrogenperoxide steam generator is oxidant, by nitrites nitrous Change and hydrogenperoxide steam generator oxidation two-step reaction synthesis trinitrophloroglucinol.The method completely avoid making of sulphuric acid and nitric acid With, little to equipment corrosion, environmental protection, mild condition, easy and simple to handle, overcome pollute present in existing synthetic method tight The problems such as weight, corrosivity is strong, condition is violent.

2. the synthetic method of the present invention is compared with tradition nitration mixture method, with gentle nitrites-hydrogenperoxide steam generator group Nitrosation-oxidation two-step reaction the system become instead of mixed acid system, it is entirely avoided sulphuric acid and the use of nitric acid, is substantially reduced Corrosivity and the discharge of spent acid to equipment, environmental protection, reaction condition is gentle, easy and simple to handle.

3. the synthetic method of the present invention is compared with existing phloroglucinol three nitration method, and yield is high, reaches as high as 78.6%, do not use the ion liquid solvent of costliness, post processing is without column chromatography, with low cost, easy and simple to handle.

Detailed description of the invention

The trinitrophloroglucinol building-up process of the present invention is as shown in Equation 3:

In reaction vessel, phloroglucinol is dissolved in alcoholic solvent, prepares the alcoholic solution of phloroglucinol, as reactant liquor.? Under condition of ice bath, being slowly added dropwise by nitrites to above-mentioned reactant liquor, every 50mmoL phloroglucinol reaction thing adds nitrites 150～200mmoL, ice bath stirring 0.5h, be warmed to room temperature stirring 0.5h.Evaporated under reduced pressure alcoholic solvent, adds 10% sodium hydroxide Aqueous solution, stirring and dissolving, it is thus achieved that Nitrosation Products solution.At ambient temperature, hydrogenperoxide steam generator is dropped to above-mentioned reaction In liquid, every 50mmoL phloroglucinol reaction thing adds 30% hydrogenperoxide steam generator 150～450mmoL, and 8h is stirred at room temperature.At ice bath bar Under part, with concentrated hydrochloric acid, reactant liquor pH is adjusted to pH=1～2, extracts through ethyl acetate, after washing, evaporated under reduced pressure, i.e. obtain target Product trinitrophloroglucinol.

Alcoholic solvent described in the synthetic method of the present invention is methanol, ethanol or their mixture.

Described nitrites is n-propyl nitrite or isobutyl nitrite or amyl nitrite, and addition is: every 50mmoL phloroglucinol reaction thing adds nitrites 150～200mmoL, more preferably 160～200mmoL, is most preferably 200mmoL。

Described hydrogenperoxide steam generator addition is: every 50mmoL phloroglucinol reaction thing adds 30% hydrogenperoxide steam generator 150 ～450mmoL, more preferably 300～450mmoL, most preferably 300mmoL.
