section.content: The present invention relates to the present invention and the detection method of a kind of Sa heat 13 taste roc bird preparations is provided.The present invention adds myrobalan, the banksia rose, nutmeg and the discriminating of valuable medicinal Moschus on the basis of primary standard, adds the inspection of iron staff mallet mesaconitine, further ensure that product safety, homogeneous, effective, quality controllable.
本发明涉及本发明提供种萨热十三味鹏鸟制剂的检测方法。本发明在原标准的基础上增加了诃子、木香、肉豆蔻及贵重药材麝香的鉴别，增加了铁棒槌中乌头碱的检查，进步确保了产品安全、均、有效、质量可控。

A kind of detection method of Sa heat 13 taste roc bird preparationsTechnical field

The present invention relates to the detection method of a kind of Sa heat 13 taste roc bird preparations, belong to pharmaceutical technology field.

Background technology

Tibetan medicine's pharmacy is the rarity in China's medical treasure-house, occupy in big nationality of China four medicine (hide, cover, Uygur, the Dai Nationality Race) first of, it is that Tibetan people have accumulated the long-term experience of life and middle this national medicine of summary of process combated the disease While experience, while national medicine experience, absorbing the medicine and pharmacology such as traditional Chinese medicine and pharmacy, big food, India theoretical, gradually form is complete Whole theoretical system.Tibetan medicine's pharmacy is the important component part in motherland's medicine and pharmacology treasure-house.

China's Tibetan medicine quality standard development: classification and form narration in Tibetan medicine and pharmacology ancient books and records " Jingzhubencao ", the Four-Volume Medical Code The most full and accurate, but do not have systematic discriminating and quality analysis, only there is experience identification, it is impossible to ensure Tibetan medicine quality." six provinces in 1979 District's Tibetan medicine standard " include medicinal material 174 kinds, 290, proved recipe preparation, but middle Tibetan medicine intersection medicinal material accounts for 79%, applies thin under inspection item Layer chromatography, micro-, fluorescence discriminating and various chemical analysis method, but concentrate on middle Tibetan medicine intersection medicinal material.1992 Qinghais save and issue Qinghai Province's Tibetan medicine standard of cloth, deletes middle Tibetan medicine intersection medicinal material, includes medicinal material 150 kinds, 170 kinds of proved recipe preparation, proved recipe preparation In have and differentiate 22 of item, wherein 105 kinds have in the Tibetan medicine of discriminating, microscopical characters 66 kinds, 2 kinds of application indentification by TLC, Other are the technology such as physics and chemistry, fluorescence.Nineteen ninety-five has promulgated People's Republic of China's drug standards Tibetan medicine (first), indicates Tibetan medicine Entering the legal management new stage, wherein include Tibetan medicine material 136 kinds, tibetan traditional medicine 200 kinds, 103 kinds of medicinal materials have discriminating item, test for 57 Square preparation has discriminating item, and wherein 47 use thin layer to differentiate." Chinese Pharmacopoeia " (nineteen ninety-five version) records Tibetan medicine proved recipe preparation mirror Other item increased to 14 by 5, use thin layer authentication technique, and all show chemical reference substance and control medicinal material." Chinese Pharmacopoeia " (version in 2000) includes 17 kinds of tibetan traditional medicine.In recent years Tibetan medicine new varieties nearly hundred kinds (" five kinds of Tibetan medicine matter are declared in SFDA approval various places Amount research on standard ", Gansu Chinese of Traditional Chinese Medicine's Master's thesis, in May, 2012).

Sa heat 13 taste roc bird balls are a kind of tradition Tibetan medicine, standard number: WS3-BC-0330-95, by following weight proportion Medicinal material make: Moschus 7.5g, banksia rose 500g, Rhizoma Acori Calami 65g, Aconitum Szechenyianum Gay 50g, myrobalan 100g, coral 40g, pearl 25g, fourth Fragrant 20g, nutmeg 75.5g, agalloch eaglewood 50g, magnetite 25g, licorice root ointment 40g, limonite 250g.For apoplexy, " white vein " causes Facial paralysis, paralysis and numbness, vasculitis, tenosynovitis, extremities joint is unfavorable, leprosy etc..

Sa heat 13 taste roc bird ball quality standard (WS3-BC-0330-95) the most delayed, only proterties and check item, inspection Survey the most comprehensively, the most accurate, it is impossible to ensure Sa heat 13 taste roc bird balls safely, effectively, quality controllable.Prior art describes Sa The exploration of the detection method of heat 13 taste roc bird balls and improvement.

" in tibetan traditional medicine Sa heat 13 taste roc bird balls, the banksia rose, the thin layer of pearl differentiate " (" China's drug standards ", 2000 03 phase, Cao Yueping, sweet green plum) disclose: the preparation 1 of (one) test liquid, take sample 5 g, finely ground, add ethyl acetate 30ml, leaching Bubble overnight, filters, and filtrate low temperature is evaporated, and residue adds methyl alcohol 2 ml and dissolves, for need testing solution ".(2) control medicinal material solution Preparation 1, takes banksia rose control medicinal material 0.5 g finely ground, adds ethyl acetate 10ml and be made in the same way of control medicinal material solution.1. (1) the banksia rose divides Do not draw test solution (1) 5 μ l, banksia rose control medicinal material solution 5 μ l, without the negative controls 5 μ l of the banksia rose, put respectively in same On silica gel g thin-layer plate, being that solvent launches with benzene one ethyl acetate (19:1), spray is with 5% vanillin-sulfuric acid test solution, and hot blast is blown to Spot development is clear.Result test liquid and control medicinal material liquid are on relevant position, and an aobvious blue spot, negative controls is without this spot Point.

" Sa heat 13 taste roc bird ball quality standards " (" Chinese experimental pharmacology of traditional Chinese medical formulae magazine ", in December, 2011, volume 17, the 24 phases, Zhang Yan, Ding Yonghui, Ni Lin, etc.) disclosing: 8 taste medicinal materials in prescription have been carried out differentiating and checking by this experiment TLC method The discriminating of the banksia rose, Moschus (present invention only quote at this).

The banksia rose, takes this product finely ground powder 5g, adds chloroform 20 mL, ultrasonically treated 30 min, filters, and filtrate is as test sample Solution.Separately take negative controls 5 g and banksia rose control medicinal material 1g of the scarce banksia rose, be respectively prepared negative control solution and comparison with method Medicinal material solution.Test according to thin-layered chromatography, draw each 5 μ L of above-mentioned 3 kinds of solution, put respectively on same silica gel g thin-layer plate, with chlorine An imitative hexamethylene (5:1) is solvent, launches, and takes out, dries.Spray, with 5% vanillin-sulfuric acid test solution, is heated to spot at 105 DEG C Point colour developing is clear.In test sample chromatogram, on position corresponding with control medicinal material chromatogram, the spot of aobvious same color.

Moschus, take this product finely ground powder 20 g, add petroleum ether (30 1 60 DEG C) 30 mL, ultrasonic 20 min, filter, filter Liquid volatilizes, and residue adds methyl alcohol 2 mL makes dissolving, as need testing solution.The negative controls 20g separately taking scarce Moschus is made in the same way of Negative control solution.Taking Moschus control medicinal material O.2 g again, 1 m that adds diethyl ether makes control medicinal material solution.Try according to thin-layered chromatography Testing, draw test sample and each 5 μ L of negative control solution, control medicinal material solution 12 μ L puts respectively on same silica gel g thin-layer plate, with Petroleum ether (60～90 DEG C) ethyl acetate (9.5:0.5) is solvent, launches, and takes out, dries.Spray is with 5% vanillin-sulfuric acid Test solution, is heated to spot development at 105 DEG C clear.In test sample chromatogram, on position corresponding with control medicinal material chromatogram, aobvious phase Same colored speckles.

" Sa heat 13 taste roc bird ball quality standard researches " (Qinghai ethnic university Master's thesis, in May, 2013) (present invention The discriminating of the banksia rose is only quoted at this) disclose following content:

3.3.1 the indentification by TLC of the banksia rose

(1) preparation of reference substance solution: precision weighs dehydro-α-curcumene reference substance 0.01005g and puts 10ml measuring bottle In, add methyl alcohol and dissolve and be diluted to scale, shake up, to obtain final product, as reference substance solution.

(2) preparation of banksia rose negative control solution: remove banksia rose medicinal material by Sa heat 13 taste roc bird prescription, weigh in proportion Lack the negative medicinal powder 2.0g of the banksia rose, put in tool plug conical flask, add chloroform 10ml, ultrasonic extraction 30 minutes, put Cold, filter, filtrate is put and is evaporated in water-bath, and residue adds 2ml methyl alcohol and dissolves, and to obtain final product.

(3) preparation of need testing solution: weigh test sample powder 2.0g, puts in tool plug conical flask, adds chloroform 10ml, ultrasonic extraction 30 minutes, let cool, filter, filtrate is put and is evaporated in water-bath, and residue adds 2ml methyl alcohol and dissolves, and to obtain final product.

(4) thin-layer chromatography condition:

Lamellae: silica G plate

Point sample: each 10 l of reference substance solution 5 l, need testing solution and negative control solution

Solvent: chloroform-hexamethylene-methyl alcohol (40:8:0.5)

Colour developing: 5% vanillin-sulfuric acid solution, 105 DEG C are heated to clear spot

(5) result:

Need testing solution is shown the same position of blue principal spot, the spot of aobvious same color, feminine gender in reference substance solution Contrast solution in this position without corresponding spot.

" five kinds of Tibetan medicine quality standard researches " (Gansu Chinese of Traditional Chinese Medicine's Master's thesis, in May, 2012), (present invention only drew at this With the discriminating of the banksia rose) disclose following content:

Chapter 2, the research of Sa heat 13 taste roc bird ball quality standards.2.2.1 banksia rose indentification by TLC: control medicinal material Solution, negative control solution preparation method with the control medicinal material solution in chapter 1 2.2.1 banksia rose indentification by TLC, feminine gender The preparation method of contrast solution.The preparation of need testing solution: take this product 5g, finely ground, add chloroform 20ml, ultrasonically treated 30min, filters, and filtrate is concentrated into 2ml, as need testing solution.Chromatographic condition and detection condition are with chapter 1 2.2.1.Chromatogram Condition and detection condition are with the chromatographic condition in chapter 1 2.2.1 banksia rose indentification by TLC and detection condition.

Chapter 1, the research of Da Simabao ball quality standard.2.2.1 banksia rose indentification by TLC: the system of need testing solution Standby: to take this product 5g, finely ground, add chloroform 10ml, ultrasonically treated 30min, let cool, filter, filtrate is concentrated into 2ml, as confession Test sample solution.The preparation of control medicinal material solution: take banksia rose control medicinal material 1g, be made in the same way of control medicinal material solution.Negative control is molten The preparation of liquid: according to prescription ratio and technique, negative sample made by other medicinal materials taking the scarce banksia rose, according to the system of need testing solution Preparation Method makes negative control solution.Chromatographic condition and detection condition: draw above-mentioned each 5 l of three kinds of solution, put respectively in same On silica gel g thin-layer plate, with chloroform-hexamethylene (5:1) as solvent, launching, take out, dry, spray is with 1% vanillin-sulfuric acid Solution, is heated to spot development at 105 DEG C clear.Result: the method through test of many times, favorable reproducibility, in test sample chromatogram, The spot of aobvious same color on position corresponding with control medicinal material chromatogram, and negative control is noiseless.

In sum, owing to the most flavour of a drug of tibetan traditional medicine prescription are many, recipe quantity is little, and active ingredient is indefinite, and common animals Medicine and mineral drug, therefore can not fully according to the monarch of Chinese medicine, minister, help, make the principle crucial medicinal material quality control in addition to prescription. The present invention provides the detection method of a kind of Sa heat 13 taste roc bird preparations.

Summary of the invention

Sa heat 13 taste roc bird preparations include Sa heat 13 taste roc bird balls and prepare with Sa heat 13 taste roc bird ball formulas Other preparations.

Sa heat 13 taste roc bird balls are the nomenclature of drugs that health ministry drug standards Tibetan medicine first is recorded.

Weight-volume relationship of the present invention is g/mL or kg/L；

Dilute bismuth potassium iodide test solution of the present invention, ammonia solution, vanillin-sulfuric acid solution, ferric trichloride ethanol etc. all meet Chinese Pharmacopoeia respective specified.

The present invention adds myrobalan, the banksia rose, nutmeg and the discriminating of valuable medicinal Moschus on the basis of primary standard, increases The inspection of iron staff mallet mesaconitine, further ensure that product safety, homogeneous, effective, quality controllable.

Technical scheme is as follows:

A kind of detection method of Sa heat 13 taste roc bird preparations, including one or more in following detection method:

A. myrobalan differentiates

Take Sa heat 13 taste roc bird preparation fine powder 2-10g, add methyl alcohol 10-50ml, ultrasonic extraction 0.5-2 hour, filter, As need testing solution；

Take gallic acid reference substance appropriate, add methyl alcohol and make every 1ml solution containing 1mg, as reference substance solution；

Draw above two solution each 1-5 μ l respectively, put on same silica gel g thin-layer plate, with volume parts ratio as 4-8: 3-5:0.5-2 oxolane-isopropanol-glacial acetic acid is solvent, launches, and takes out, dries, and spray is with w/v 2% tri-chlorination Iron ethanol solution, is heated to spot development at 105 DEG C clear；In test sample chromatogram, on position corresponding with reference substance chromatogram, The spot of aobvious same or like color；

B. nutmeg, the banksia rose differentiate

Taking Sa heat 13 taste roc bird preparation fine powder 0.5-2g, adding boiling range is 60-90 DEG C of petroleum ether 10-25ml, ultrasonically treated 10-60 minute, filter, as need testing solution；

Taking nutmeg control medicinal material fine powder 0.5-2g, adding boiling range is 60-90 DEG C of petroleum ether 10-25ml, ultrasonically treated 10-60 Minute, filter, prepare nutmeg control medicinal material solution；

Taking banksia rose control medicinal material fine powder 0.5-2g, adding boiling range is 60-90 DEG C of petroleum ether 10-25ml, and ultrasonically treated 10-60 divides Clock, filters, and prepares banksia rose control medicinal material solution；

Draw above-mentioned three kinds of solution each 2-10 μ l respectively, put on same silica gel g thin-layer plate, with volume parts ratio as 10- 20:3-7:0.5-2 cyclohexane-carboxylic acid ethyl ester-formic acid is solvent, launches, and takes out, dries, and sprays the perfume (or spice) with w/v 5% Oxalaldehyde sulfuric acid solution, 105 DEG C are heated to clear spot；In test sample chromatogram, on position corresponding with reference substance chromatogram, aobvious phase The spot of same or similar color；

C. Moschus differentiates

Taking Sa heat 13 taste roc preparation fine powder 1-5g, add diethyl ether 10-25ml, ultrasonic extraction 10-60 minute, filters, filtrate It is concentrated into 1ml, as need testing solution；

Taking Moschus control medicinal material 0.1-0.5g, add diethyl ether 10-25ml, ultrasonic extraction 10-60 minute, filters, and filtrate concentrates To 1ml, as prepared control medicinal material solution；

Draw above two solution each 2-10 μ l respectively, put on same silica gel g thin-layer plate, with volume parts ratio as 4-8: 3-5:0.1-0.5 hexamethylene-dichloromethane-ethyl acetate is solvent, launches, and takes out, dries, and spray is with w/v 2% Vanillin-sulfuric acid solution, is heated to clear spot；In test sample chromatogram, on position corresponding with reference substance chromatogram, aobvious identical Or the spot of similar color；

D, aconitine limit inspection

inventionTitles.title: A kind of ursolic acid-Aspirin Conjugate and the application in preparation prevention tumor metastasis medicine thereof
种熊果酸-阿司匹林偶联物及其在制备预防肿瘤转移药物中的应用

address.address1: 350108, Fujian, Fuzhou Province, Minhou County town street, University Road, No. 2, Fuzhou University New District
350108, Fujian, Fuzhou Province, Minhou County town street, University Road, No. 2, Fuzhou University New District
Fuzhou Patent Trademark Agency Ltd. 35100 yuan

event-title.$: TERMINATION OF PATENT RIGHT DUE TO NON-PAYMENT OF ANNUAL FEE
GRANT OF PATENT OR UTILITY MODEL

section.content: The present invention relates to a kind of ursolic acid Aspirin Conjugate as shown in formula (I) and the application in preparation prevention and treatment tumor metastasis medicine thereof.Shown by experiment in vitro, the ursolic acid Aspirin Conjugate that the present invention relates to the adhesion of tumour cell, migrate, invasion and attack etc. have significant inhibitory action.Interior animal experiment shows, it is effectively reduced the experimental lung metastasis of mouse 4T1 breast cancer, shows that it has preferable inhibiting effect on tumor metastasis.The ursolic acid Aspirin Conjugate of the present invention can be applicable in the prophylactic agent of metastases, and for developing the rebirth medicine of metastases, postoperative the retransferring of prevention malignant tumour provides new selection.

本发明涉及种如式(I)所示的熊果酸‑阿司匹林偶联物及其在制备预防和治疗肿瘤转移药物中的应用。通过体外实验表明，本发明涉及的熊果酸‑阿司匹林偶联物对肿瘤细胞的粘附、迁移、侵袭等具有显著的抑制作用。体内动物实验表明，其可有效减少小鼠4T1乳腺癌的实验性肺转移，显示其具有较好的抗肿瘤转移作用。本发明的熊果酸‑阿司匹林偶联物可应用于肿瘤转移的预防药物中，为开发肿瘤转移的新生药物，预防恶性肿瘤的术后再转移提供了新的选择。

A kind of ursolic acid-Aspirin Conjugate and at preparation prevention tumor metastasis medicine In applicationTechnical field

The present invention relates to a kind of ursolic acid-Aspirin Conjugate and application thereof, a kind of ursolic acid-A Si Woods conjugate and the application in preparation prevention and treatment tumor metastasis medicine thereof.

Background technology

Malignant tumour is one of major disease of serious harm human health, and the tumor patient cause of death is mostly pernicious swollen Knurl transfer in late period is caused.Metastases (Cancer metastasis) refers to that tumour cell dissociates from primary tumor, to surrounding tissue Infiltration, invasion and attack enter the circulatory system and shift the most in vivo, and adhere to infiltrate, with endothelial cell, processes such as forming metastatic tumor. Metastases is the one of the main reasons that tumour is difficult to cure and recur, and is also the key factor causing tumor patient dead.Face Bed diagnostic result shows, the first visit tumor patient of about more than 60% has occurred and that transfer, and its 5 years survival rates are less than 20%.At present, The only metastases patient of only a few effectively can be treated by operation, and other clinical treatment mode effects have very much Limit.Therefore, the preventing and treating of metastases is faced with very stern challenge, and the infiltration metastasis how blocking tumour is to improve tumour to control Treatment level and the key of healing tumour.

Clinical practice antineoplastic number the most greatly is chemotherapeutics at present, and it is numerous that these medicines can act on growth of tumour cell In the different links grown, suppress or kill tumour cell.Chemotherapeutics, while killing tumor cell, kills again normal structure Cell, especially kill in human body blood, the lymphocyte etc. growing vigorous, and these cells and tissue be people The immune defense system that body weight is wanted, destroys the immune system of human body, and cancer, it is possible to develop rapidly, causes serious consequence.Change Treating medicine and mostly lack selectivity, distribution in vivo is extensive, easily causes toxic and side effect, causes patient not to be resistant to, and reduces medicine and treats Effect.Therefore, people are devoted to the research of new type antineoplastic medicine always in recent years, the most effectively suppress the medicine of Nasopharyngeal neoplasms Thing is a new drug development direction.

Ursolic acid (Ursolic Acid is called for short UA), has another name called malol, is a kind of natural origin α-botany bar gum alcohol type five rings Triterpene compound.According to incompletely statistics, in the 108 kinds of plants of 34 section in nature can isolated UA, it is main It is distributed in the medicinal plants such as the fruit of glossy privet, hawthorn, Asiatic plantain, the capsule of weeping forsythia.UA has pharmacological activity widely, such as anticancer, guarantor Liver, anti-inflammatory, antiviral, anti-oxidant etc..Nowadays, UA is just with feature and the diversified mechanism of anticancer action of its notable high-efficiency low-toxicity It is increasingly subject to people pay attention to.On the other hand, UA has and preferably protects the liver anti-inflammatory efficacy, and can strengthen body's immunity.Thus Can overcome the limitation that conventional chemotherapeutic drugs toxicity is big, safety coefficient is low, while treatment, side effect is little, toxicity is low.In recent years Come the most deep to the antitumor research of UA both at home and abroad, and find its at tumor prevention, treat and prevent late recurrent from shifting Etc. aspect have uniqueness advantage and potential application prospect.

Aspirin (Aspirin is called for short ASP) obtains as actasal, the effect of prevention metastases medicine To fully proving, inflammation has obvious facilitation for growth, the transfer of tumour, can reduce the autoimmunity of people simultaneously Power.Some inflammatory factor also can promote Angiogenesis, and aspirin then can suppress metastases by reducing inflammatory reaction. It can also suppress the activity of COX-2 enzyme simultaneously, and COX-2 enzyme has promotion Angiogenesis, makes apoptosis of tumor cells and propagation Balance be broken, promote that tumour cell, to the invasion and attack of basilar memebrane and infiltration, and reduces the immunity of patient simultaneously.Deliver newly " lancet " article in referring again to metastases and hematoblastic relation, and show solidifying at tumour cell of blood platelet Party makes circulating tumor cell in blood avoid by the immunocyte of body to eliminate, and induced tumor cell becomes more to attack simultaneously Property.Aspirin has the effect of suppression platelet aggregation, also has certain curative effect for suppression metastases.Therefore Ah Si Woods can effectively reduce its activity as inhibitor and the medicament for resisting platelet aggregation of traditional COX-2 enzyme and reach good The effect of prevention metastases.

Summary of the invention

For above-mentioned situation, for solving the defect of prior art, the purpose of the present invention is just to provide one, and to have prevention swollen The compound of tumor metastasis activity, by having clinical practice medicine aspirin and the high-efficiency low-toxicity of inhibiting effect on tumor metastasis Antitumor Natural Products ursolic acid carries out covalent coupling, investigates its synergy effect, it is expected to obtains and safer presses down reliably The novel of Nasopharyngeal neoplasms processed prevents and treats metastases drug candidate.

The present invention relates to a kind of ursolic acid-Aspirin Conjugate (being abbreviated as ASP-UA afterwards) as shown in formula (I) and Its application in preparation prevention and treatment tumor metastasis medicine.

The preparation method of this conjugate is as follows:

Under room temperature, acetylsalicylic acid (aspirin) is dissolved in dry dichloromethane, adds oxalyl chloride, stir 10h, subtract Pressure is evaporated off gas and solvent.Rejoining dichloromethane, solution passes through constant pressure funnel to the pyridine dissolved with ursolic acid and DMAP: two Chloromethanes (1v/1v) mixed solution and dripping, continues stirring 8-10h after being added dropwise to complete.After reaction completely, remove dichloromethane under reduced pressure Alkane.Adding elutriation in reaction bulb and go out product, suction filtration, and it is the most neutral to wash filter cake with water, vacuum drying, column chromatography obtains this coupling Thing.

Above-mentioned ursolic acid-Aspirin Conjugate is in the application of anti-tumor metastasis, and described tumour includes but not limited to breast Gland cancer.

In above-mentioned application, this conjugate content in prevention tumor metastasis medicine is more than or equal to 50%.

In above-mentioned application, this conjugate can make various formulation jointly with pharmaceutically acceptable carrier: powder, tablet, Granule, capsule, solution, powder pin, emulsion, liposome, supensoid agent, gel, spray, aerosol, aerosol, dust cloud Agent, lotion, liniment, ointment, emplastrum, paste, patch, suppository, drops or pill, also can be given by various in treatment Prescription formula realizes: oral administration, drug administration by injection, respiratory tract administration, percutaneous drug delivery, mucosa delivery, cavity/canal drug administration etc..

Beneficial effects of the present invention:

(1). conjugate is less to cytotoxicity in low strength range, is the anti-swollen of a kind of potential high-efficiency low-toxicity Tumor metastasis medicine.

(2). conjugate can suppress the adhesion of tumour cell and extracellular matrix.

(3). conjugate can suppress the motion transfer ability of tumour cell.

(4). conjugate can suppress the invasive ability of tumour cell.

(5). conjugate can suppress the expression of tumor cell surface adhesion molecule.

(6). conjugate can be prevented and treated breast cancer and lung's transfer occurs.

Accompanying drawing explanation

The IR Characterization collection of illustrative plates of Fig. 1 conjugate ASP-UA；

Fig. 2 medicine inhibited proliferation to breast cancer cell MCF-7；

Fig. 3 pharmaceutical intervention breast cancer cell MCF-7 and the adhesive capacity of FN cellular matrix glue；

The impact on breast cancer cell MCF-7 invasive ability of Fig. 4 medicine；

The impact that breast cancer cell MCF-7 surface adhesins CD44 is expressed by Fig. 5 A and Fig. 5 B medicine；

The experimental lung metastasis of Fig. 6 Drug inhibition mouse 4T1 breast cancer.

Detailed description of the invention

In order to make content of the present invention easily facilitate understanding, below in conjunction with detailed description of the invention to of the present invention Technical scheme is described further, but the present invention is not limited only to this.

Embodiment 1

Under room temperature, 0.5g acetylsalicylic acid (aspirin) is dissolved in the dichloromethane that 20mL is dried, and adds 2mL oxalyl chloride, Magnetic agitation 10h, removes gas and solvent under reduced pressure.Again in reaction bulb add 20mL dichloromethane, by constant pressure funnel to 20mL 1v/1v pyridine dissolved with 1.27g ursolic acid and 0.1eq DMAP: dichloromethane mixed solution and dripping, after being added dropwise to complete Continue stirring 8-10h.After reaction completely, remove dichloromethane under reduced pressure.In reaction bulb, add 100mL elutriation go out product, suction filtration, With 500mL washing filter cake to neutral, vacuum drying, column chromatography obtains ASP-UA.

Proterties: white powder；Productivity: 70.51%；Characterization of The Products data are as follows: 1H NMR (500MHz, CDCl3) δ 10.52 (s, 1H), 7.93 (dd, J=8.0,1.6Hz, 1H), 7.55 7.50 (m, 1H), 7.01 (t, J=6.5Hz, 1H), 6.94 (t, J=7.6Hz, 1H), 5.37 5.22 (m, 1H), 4.59 4.44 (m, 1H), 2.33 (d, J=4.3Hz, 1H), 2.29 (s, 1H), 2.22 (d, J=11.3Hz, 1H), 2.03 (dd, J=13.4,4.3Hz, 1H), 1.91 (ddd, J=18.0,11.2, 4.0Hz, 3H), 1.80 1.61 (m, 6H), 1.50 (ddd, J=20.6,12.6,5.9Hz, 4H), 1.43 1.30 (m, 4H), 1.17 1.06 (m, 5H), 1.03 (dd, J=10.4,7.4Hz, 1H), 1.00 0.94 (m, 6H), 0.86 (ddd, J=27.8, 20.2,13.5Hz,13H).

HRMS: theoretical value: 641.3813m/z actual value: 641.3820m/z Diff:-1.21ppm

IR Characterization result is shown in Fig. 1.

Embodiment 2

After being digested by the mouse mastopathy cell MCF-7 being in exponential phase, cell density is adjusted to 1 × 105Individual/ ML, is inoculated in 96 orifice plates, every hole 100 μ l, puts 37 DEG C, 5%CO2Incubator is cultivated 24h；Removing old culture medium, addition is subject to Test medicine is stored liquid dilution by reagent thing culture medium, sets different concentration, every hole 100 μ l, separately sets blank group, often Group sets 5 multiple holes.After medicine effect 24h, inhale and abandon pastille culture medium, add without blood in every hole. without phenol red 1640 culture mediums 100 μ l, adds the solution 100 μ l of 0.5mg/ml MTT, after continuing to hatch 4h, terminates cultivating；Careful suction abandons supernatant in 96 orifice bores Liquid, every hole adds 100 μ l DSMO, and vibrate 10min, is on ELIASA in 570nm wavelength and measures each hole absorbance value (OD Value), calculate cell survival rate (%)=(medication group mean OD value/blank group mean OD value) × 100%.Use GraphPad Prism software carries out data process.

MTT result shows as in figure 2 it is shown, when the drug concentration scope at 30-80 μM, UA and conjugate ASP-UA is to breast Adenocarcinoma cell has significant inhibited proliferation, and medicine kills and has dose dependent, and wherein ASP-UA conjugate is to breast The IC50 of adenocarcinoma cell MCF-7 is at about 70 μMs, and UA is maintained between 30-40 μM, and control drug aspirin (ASP) exists In this concentration range, (0-100 μM) does not has lethal effect substantially to this tumour cell.Additionally, all of medicine is in low strength range Within interior (0-20 μM) is held at 20% to the lethality of MCF-7 tumour cell.In view of conjugate ASP-UA at low concentration In the range of (0-20 μM) have the feature of safety and low toxicity concurrently, therefore can develop profit as the preventive medicine of metastases With.Therefore we choose the compound of 0-20 μM of concentration range and carry out the experimental studies such as follow-up external adhesion, transfer, can get rid of Because the proliferation function of medicine suppression tumour itself causes the interference that experimental result produces.

Embodiment 3

The FN FN (fibronectin) being stored in-20 DEG C is statically placed in 37 DEG C of water-baths to melting completely, with without blood Clear nutrient solution, is configured as the FN working solution that concentration is 10 μ g/ml.100 μ L/ hole FN working solutions are used to be completely covered by 96 holes Plate, left at room temperature over night, suck liquid gently.Taking the logarithm MCF-7 cell in growth period, make single cell suspension, cell concentration is 5 ×105/ ml, mixes with the medicine (0,5,10,15,20 μMs) of variable concentrations, is inoculated in coated 96 orifice plates of FN.37 DEG C, 5% CO2After hatching 2h, PBS rinses 3 times, adds the nutrient solution 100 μ l of MTT, continues to hatch 4h, abandon supernatant, add 100 μ l after draining DMSO, uses the OD value at enzyme connection detector detection 570nm after dissolving.Adhesion inhibition rate (%)=(1-medication group mean OD value/ Blank group mean OD value) × 100%.

Result display three all can substantially suppress the breast cancer cell MCF-7 adhesive capacity to FN glue, inhibiting rate 10.48%-47.63%, has dose dependent, and conjugate has higher relative to parent ursolic acid and aspirin simultaneously Inhibiting rate, result is shown in Fig. 3.

Embodiment 4

Choosing the MCF-7 cell of exponential phase, after Trypsin Induced, adjusting cell concentration is 2 × 105/ ml, with 2ml/ hole is inoculated in 6 orifice plates, is placed in 37 DEG C, 5%CO2Incubator in cultivate 12h, when cell monolayer is paved with orifice plate；Draw " one " font cut, PBS rinses 3 times, be separately added into blank cultures and UA (20 μMs), ASP (1mM), ASP-UA (10 μMs) and ASP-UA (20 μMs) also takes pictures, and after cultivating 12h and 24h, take pictures again in same position, measures migration distance.Experiment is in triplicate Calculate cell migration rate=[(medication group 0h average distance medication group 12h/24h average distance)/(control group 0h average departure From control group 12h/24h average distance) × 100%].

Inhibition of metastasis rate after breast cancer cell MCF-7 effect is detected by single medicine and conjugate, and result shows: with control group Comparing, the UA of 20 μMs is 14.63% (p < 0.05) to the inhibition of metastasis rate of breast cancer cell after effect 12h, and ASP-UA Inhibiting rate is 29.12% (p < 0.05).Along with the increase of action time, the mobility of MCF-7 cell significantly reduces；The UA of 20 μMs After breast cancer cell MCF-7 effect 24h, the inhibition of metastasis rate of cell is only 19.56%, and with the inhibiting rate of concentration conjugate Then it is up to 34.67% (p < 0.01).It is shown in Table 1.

The impact on breast cancer cell MCF-7 mobility of table 1 medicine

Mobility (%, 12h)Mobility (%, 24h)Control100100UA(20μM)85.37±0.47*80.44±1.01*ASP(1mM)92.65±1.4190.37±1.19*ASP-UA(10μM)78.61±1.11*70.21±2.51**ASP-UA(20μM)70.88±0.77**65.33±2.34**

(mean value ± standard deviation, n=3, compared with control group, * p < 0.05, * * p < 0.01)

Embodiment 5

Cover room on 3D invasion and attack cell with 100 μ L Matrigel glue, in super-clean bench, irradiate 2h with ultraviolet, make Matrigel glue is fully polymerized.With 0.25% Trypsin Induced MCF-7 Breast Cancer Cell, UA (20 μMs), ASP (1mM) and ASP-UA (20 μMs) acts on 24h, and control group adds the culture medium of equivalent 0.1%DMSO, adjusts concentration to 4 × 105Individual/mL, often Group is inhaled 200 μ L respectively and is inoculated in room, and cell is placed in 24 orifice plates, and lower room adds cultivates containing 20% calf serum RPMI-1640 24h.Taking out cell, Matrigel glue and the cell of room wiped by cotton swab, and methyl alcohol fixes film 10min, violet staining, high power lens Cell number in 6 visuals field of lower random counter, represents the invasive ability of tumour cell with cell number.

Experimental result (Fig. 4) shows, three is obvious, at same concentration to the anti-invasion effect of breast cancer cell MCF-7 Under conditions of, ASP-UA medicine group is considerably less than UA group through the cell of cell.By cell count, statistical result showed 20 μMs UA the inhibiting rate of invasion and attack is about 13.54%, the inhibiting rate that the ASP of 1mM is corresponding is about 9.7%, the ASP-UA of 20 μMs suppression Efficiency is then up to 50.32%, all has significant difference (p < 0.01) relative to control group and parent drug group.

Embodiment 6

Choosing the MCF-7 Human Breast Cancer Cells of exponential phase, after Trypsin Induced, adjusting cell concentration is 1.5 ×105/ ml, is inoculated in 6 orifice plates with 2ml/ hole, is placed in 37 DEG C, 5%CO2Incubator in cultivate 24h；Preparation desired concn UA

(20 μMs), ASP (1mM) and ASP-UA (10,20 μMs), inhale and abandon old culture medium, and in every hole, 2.0ml pastille culture medium adds Enter in orifice plate, blank group is set, continue in incubator to hatch 24h.

After 24h, cell suspension is collected in digestion, and 1000g is centrifuged 5min, carefully absorbs supernatant, adds about 1ml ice bath precooling PBS, re-suspended cell；Dosing group adds CD44[HCAM (homing cell adhesion molecule)]-APC, control group adds Enter corresponding Isotype control, after 4 DEG C hatch 30min, at flow cytometer respective excitation wavelength, detect MCF-7 cell surface adhesion The situation that factor CD44 is expressed.10,000 cells of each sample determination, utilize the average fluorescent strength of software analysis cell.

Flow cytomery shows, MCF-7 Human Breast Cancer Cells surface C D44 molecule has high expressed, and positive rate is 89.6%.Compared with control group, after variable concentrations ASP-UA (10-20 μM) acts on MCF-7 Breast Cancer Cell 24h, MCF-7 is thin The expression of cellular surface CD44 all has decline, and in dose dependent.After the ASP-UA effect 24h of 20 μMs, MCF-7 cell surface The expression of CD44 is only 38.07% (P ＜ 0.01)；And after same concentrations UA effect 24 hours, MCF-7 cell surface CD44's Expression is still 87.17% (P ＜ 0.05), and the expression corresponding for ASP of 1mM is also up to 85.35%.ASP-UA pair of 20 μMs The inhibitory action that MCF-7 cell surface CD44 expresses is more than 2 times of UA and ASP respective concentration.As shown in Fig. 5 A, B.

Embodiment 6

Use the BALB/C female mice (6-8 week) raising about one week time, by 4T1 mouse mastopathy cell suspension (4*105/ 200 μ L PBS) in tail vein injection to Mice Body.Mouse was randomly divided in second day four groups (n=7), control group (physiological saline), UA (80mg/Kg) group, ASP (40mg/Kg) group, ASP-UA (20mg/Kg) group.Gavage is continued by group dosage Being administered for four weeks, put to death mouse to about 28 days, dissociate lung, the fixing dyeing of picric acid, by the counting to transfering node Quantitative analysis metastases load.Application SPSS Statistics Version 12.0 carries out statistical analysis.

Result (Fig. 6) shows, relative to control group, the experimental lung metastasis of 4T1 mouse breast cancer is all had by each medication group There is a certain degree of inhibitory action.Under the ASP medicine effect of UA and 40mg/kg of 80mg/kg, the tubercle number of Lung metastases is Declining, by the counting of transfering node and statistical analysis, inhibiting rate is about 12.3% and 16.19%.And ASP-UA is low dense Under the medicine activity (20mg/kg) of degree, metastasis suppressor effect is obvious, and statistic analysis result display inhibiting rate is up to 30.12%, compared with parent drug, there is significant difference (p < 0.05).

1. ursolic acid-the Aspirin Conjugate as shown in formula (I):</claim-text></claim-text></claim-text>2. ursolic acid-Aspirin Conjugate as claimed in claim 1 is in preparation prevention and treatment tumor metastasis medicine
Application.</claim-text>
